author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UCYNTHIA Shange owayemele uMiss Africa South noStephanie Elizabeth Reinecke owayemele uMiss South Africa kuMiss World ngo-1972 PHEZU kokuthi ivulandlela kwezobuhle kuleli, uCynthia Philisiwe Shange, lihambe inhliziyo yalo ibuhlungu ngenxa yokuthwala kanzima kwabalingisi, kodwa lishiye umsizilo esingeke siwulibale endimeni yezobuhle nokulingisa. Ekhuluma enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo sikazakwabo, uJoe "Sdumo" Mafela eJoburg Theatre, eGoli ngoMashi 2017, uCynthia wakhuluma waze wahlengezela izinyembezi. Wathi yize ayeseneminyaka engu-43 endimeni yokulingisa kodwa wayesathwele kanzima. "Yingoba asiqashiwe ngokugcwele emsebenzini esiwenzayo. Ngiyazi ukuthi siyanijabulisa kodwa ekujuleni kwezinhliziyo zethu njengabalingisi asijabulile. Singabantu abanosizi. Singazenzisa sishuthe izithombe nani futhi sisayine ama-autograph kodwa impilo yomlingisi inzima." Wathi nakuba ayeselingise iminyaka engu-18 kwiMuvhango kodwa wayelokhu esayina isivumelwano esisha. "Angikwazi ukuboleka imali ngoba angiqashiwe ngokugcwele. Ungazama ukupatanisa ukukhokhela i-medical aid, kodwa uma uphelelwa wumsebenzi iyaphela. Ungazama ukukhokhela umasingcwabisane kodwa uma kuphela umsebenzi, uyaphela. Siyacela, uma omunye wabalingisi eshona engenayo imali, akusho ukuthi asikwazi ukonga imali. Siyazama ukonga. Sakhetha lo msebenzi, angisho ukuthi obhedayo kodwa siqhutshwa wuthando lwawo." UCynthia (76) uze wahamba emhlabeni esibhedlela saseThekwini entathakusa ngoMsombuluko, le nkinga ayekhala ngayo ngo-2017 kusakhalwa ngayo. Nokho leso sikhalo ngeke sashintsha ukuthi uCynthia uyingqalabutho eyagudluza izikhonkwane ngezikhathi ezinzima zobandlululo yayoqhudelana nezintokazi zamazwe kuMiss World ngo-1972. Umdidiyeli omkhulu weMuvhango, uDuma Ndlovu, uthe ukuba emhlabeni bekuneqiniso ngabe uCynthia ushone sekunonodoli obizwa ngaye ngenxa yomlando awuqopha ngo-1972. Ubekhuluma ngokuba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama wakuleli ukungenela uMiss World eLondon, e-UK ngoNovemba 22, 1972 futhi waphuma endaweni yesihlanu. UDuma uthe lokho kwafaka ugqozi izintokazi ezimnyama ngoba wayengekho unobuhle omnyama owake wafika kulelo zinga eNingizimu Afrika. Nakuba kunjalo uCynthia uhambe emhlabeni engakaze wahlonishwa ngeziqu noma ngenye yezindondo ezibizwa nge-Order ngoMengameli bakuleli abamnyama. UCynthia wazalelwa elokishini eliseThekwini, iLamontville, ngoJulayi 27, 1949. Waqala ukumodela ekuqaleni kweminyaka yo-1970. Waduma waziwa izwe lonke emuva kokudla umhlanganiso kuMiss Natal noMiss Africa South. Emuva kokuhlabana ngalesi sicoco sikazime wakuleli, uCynthia waklonyeliswa ngama-suitcase, isitofu sikagesi, ukheshi ka-R200 nomsakazo. Ngesikhathi sobandlululo, imiqhudelwano yonobuhle yayihlukanisiwe ngokobuhlanga njengoba abamnyama babencintisana bodwa. Esekhale wemuka nesicoco sikaMiss Africa South, uCynthia wabe eseqokwa ukuba amele iNingizimu Afrika kuMiss World. Kulowo mqhudelwano walala isihlanu kuqhudelana izingqazu zamazwe ngamazwe. UCynthia wakhumbula ukuthi lo mqhudelwano wamnikeza ithuba lokubona umhlaba nokuveza amaqiniso ngesihluku sobandlululo nokucwaswa ngokwebala eNingizimu Afrika. Ukungena kukaCynthia ekulingiseni Esebuyile phesheya, uCynthia wabe esengena emkhakheni wokulingisa emafilimini nasemidlalweni yethelevishini. Ngo-1975 walingisa efilimini yokuqala ende yabantu abamnyama bodwa eyayisihloko sithi UDeliwe. Wasuka lapho wadlulela kweyayithi Isivumelwano nakwiNkedama ngonyaka ofanayo. Waqhubekela emdlalweni wethelevishini ozigcawugcawu owawuthi Shaka Zulu ngo-1986, elingisa indawo kaMkabayi. Ngeminyaka yo-1990 wabe eselingisa indawo kaMaNkosi Buthelezi kwiMuvhango, engunina kaThandaza Buthelezi-Mukwevho (okuyindawo eyayilingiswa nguSindi Dlathu). Washada nowayeyintatheli eyayingumdlali webhola elikhokhelayo, umbhali wezincwadi nomlingisi uDerrick Thema. Umyeni kaCynthia wadlula emhlabeni ngoDisemba 31, 2021, eseneminyaka engu-74. UCynthia noDerrick babusiswa ngezingane ezine, okunguBanele, Sihle, Archie noNonhle Thema, odume kakhulu ngokwethula izinhlelo zethelevishini. UCynthia waqala ukuguliswa yisifo sikashukela kusukela ngo-2018 kangangoba wake walaliswa izinyanga ezintathu esibhedlela futhi wacishe wanqanyulwa umlenze kodwa kwagcina kususwe izinzwane. Ngo-2009 uCynthia waklonyeliswa ngendondo yeLifetime Achievement kumaSouth African Film and Television Awards (Saftas). Waphinda wahlonishwa ngalo mklomelo weLifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela KZN Film and TV Awards ngo-2024. Umufi uzofihlwa ngeSonto emuva kwenkonzo ezokuba sesikoleni saseNanda, iShembe Memorial ngo-10 ekuseni. UCYNTHIA Shange enguMkabayi kuShaka Zulu UCYNTHIA Shange ushone inhliziyo isaqaqamba UCYNTHIA Shange ephahlwe yiSilo uZwelithini noJoe Mafela ngesikhathi kukhonjiswa UDeliwe e-Eyethu Cinema eSoweto ngo-1975 UCYNTHIA Shange esangenela imiqhudelwano yonobuhle USINDI Dlathu noCynthia Shange besalingisa kwiMuvhango UNDABA Mhlongo enoCynthia Shange ngesikhathi kuqoshwa Isivumelwano UCYNTHIA Shange engenele uMiss World UCYNTHIA Shange emukela indondo yeLifetime Achievement U-CYNTHIA Shange nendodakazi uNonhle Thema

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka KUXWAYISWE abazokopela njengoba kuqale ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo zika-matric omdala kanjalo nalabo ababhala izivivinyo zeNational Senior Certificate KwaZulu-Natal. Lesi sexwayiso sikhishwe uMphathiswa wezeMfundo esifundazweni, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, izolo, njengoba bengu-25 399 ababhala lezi zivivinyo. UHlomuka uthe bazobhekana nomthetho abazophambana nemigomo yezivivinyo. "Ngeke siyibekezelele eyabazobanjwa bekopela noma ukuputshuka kwamaphepha njengoba kuqale izivivinyo. Kumele ngaso sonke isikhathi sivikelwe isithunzi sezivivinyo. Bazobhekana nomthetho abazobanjwa bephula imigomo yokubhalwa kwezivivinyo," kusho uHlomuka. Uthe kunabafundi abangu-14 240 ababhala u-matric iNational Senior Certificate esuka ngo-2008 kuze kube yimanje. Kunabangu-11 159 ababhala u-matric wangaphambi kuka-2008, ababhalayo. "Kuqeqeshwe abazoqapha ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo abangu-1 000, ezindaweni ezingu-900 zokubhalela. Kuqokwe abamakayo abangu-681 kanti izincwadi zokubaqasha zizokhishwa ngoJuni 19." Ukumakwa kwamaphepha kulindeleke ukuthi kuqale ngoJulayi 3, kuphothulwe ngoJulayi 9. "Imiphumela izokhishwa ngo-Agasti 7, 2026. Kuzogaywa amaphepha okubhalwa abalelwa ku-8 million." Uthe benze izinhlelo zokubhekana nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu njengoba kubhalwa. "Sinezingxoxo eziqhubeka ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho okuphazamisa izivivinyo okubalwa nesimo sezulu." Unxuse ababhalayo ukuthi basheshe bafike ezikhungweni zokubhala, baphathe nezincwadi zabo zokubhala. Ubakhumbuze nokuthi bangabakhohlwa omazisi babo wathi uma sebebhala bangatatazeli. "Ababeke umoya phansi, bangatatazeli. Abakholelwe ekutheni babhala into abasebenze kanzima beyifunda." Uhlabe nekhwelo kubazali, umphakathi nothisha ukuthi beseke ababhalayo. Uphinde waveza nokuthi sebehlelela izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka zika-matric. Uveze nokuthi ngenyanga ezayo kuzobhalwa nezivivinyo zamaphakathi nonyaka zika-matric zokuhlola ukulungela kwabafundi ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka. Uthe uzoveza okuningi uma esethula isabelomali somnyango esiShayamthetho ngoJuni 12, 2026. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi lesi sifundazwe siqophe umlando siqwaqwada zonke ezinye izifundazwe emiphumeleni yanyakenye ka-matric. Lesi sifundazwe senza kahle phezu kwezingqinamba ezikhona emnyangweni zemali. Lezi zingqinamba zenza umnyango ungakwazi ukukhokha ngesikhathi imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Awukwazi ngisho ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka owenza nabo imisebenzi okubalwa nabathenga izincwadi zokufunda. Nyakenye umnyango uhluleke ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni, wakwazi ukuthenga kuphela i-stationery ngenxa yemali.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMLINDO The Vocalist nonina wengane yakhe uTaylor Allison SEKUQUBUKE inkombankombane ngezinsolo zokushayana nokuhlukumezana emoyeni phakathi komculi uMlindo the Vocalist nentombi yakhe okungacaci ukuthi usajola yini nayo, uTaylor Allison. Kusuke umsindo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoLwesine ebusuku kusabalala imibhalo okuthiwa ifakwe wuTaylor edalula izinsolo zokuthi uMlindo umbeke isandla futhi walimaza ingane yakhe ekhanda ngeselula. Le ntokazi noMlindo wodumo lwengoma ethi AmaBlesser, banengane. "Phambilini ngayishiya le ndoda kodwa yakhala yangincenga ithi angiyibuyise futhi ifuna ukuba 'yindoda yomndeni' kodwa iyisigebengu. Uthanda kakhulu ucansi futhi usengithelele ngezifo izikhawu eziningi athi ziqhamuka ethoyilethi," kubhala uTaylor. Uqhube wathi uMlindo akabenzeli lutho nengane ngoba unezinye izinganeazinakekelayo. Uthe yingakho ngesikhathi ehamba efulethini ababehlala kulo athatha yonke into ngoba kwakuthengwe nguye ngemali yakhe. Esitatimendeni asifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uMlindo, ogama lakhe laokuzalwa nguLindokuhle Mgedezi, uziphikile izinsolo zokuthi uyahlukumeza. "Sekuyisikhathi eside ngithule ngoba ngihlonipha ubudlelwano bethu futhi ngethemba ukuthi sizolungisa izinto ngasese. Ngiyabona kodwa manje ukuthi ukuthula kwami kuthatheka ngenye indlela. Ngibona kubalulekile ukuthi ngiveze ukuthi nami ngike ngahlukumezeka emoyeni nasemzimbeni ngabhekana nezinye izingqinamba ebudlelwaneni engikhethe ukuthi ngingazivezi emphakathini," kusho uMlindo. Uthe okusatshalaliswa emphakathini kungcolisa igama lakhe. UMlindo uthe ucela ukunikwa isikhathi sokubhekana nezinto zakhe futhi unethemba lokuthi iqiniso lizovela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasesiswini weKaizer Chiefs, uSibongiseni "Ox" Mthethwa, ubalwa nabaphelelwa yizinkontileka eNaturena ngenyanga ezayo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs abaphelelwa yizinkontileka banengcindezi yokukhombisa abaphathi ukuthi kukhona abasengakwenzela leli qembu elizodlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngesizini ezayo. Amakhosi azibekisele indawo kulo mqhudelwano kusasele imidlalo emibili kuphele isizini yeBetway Premiership ka-2025/2026. Anamaphuzu angu-51 emidlalweni engu-28 okuyinto osekuneminyaka agcina ukuyenza. Leli qembu eliholwa ngabaqeqeshi, uKhalil Ben Youssef no-Cedric Kaze, linethuba lokuqeda isizini linamaphuzu angu-57. Namuhla ngo-3 ntambama eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, iChiefs izobhekana naMaZulu emdlalweni wePremiership ingasenayo ingcindezi yokunqoba kwazise alisekho iqembu elingayigudluza endaweni yesithathu kwi-log. Emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini, iChiefs izobhekana neChippa United eMabhida ngoMeyi 23. Nokho ingcindezi ikubadlali abambalwa abaphelelwa yizinkontileka eNaturena ngenyanga ezayo. Laba badlali basenalo ithuba lokujika umqondo abaphathi beqembu okungenzeka ukuthi sebezithathile izinqumo ngekusasa labo. Kulaba badlali kukhona uSibongiseni "Ox" Mthethwa oyibamba enkabeni yenkundla, Dillan Solomons, Pule Mmodi, Gaston Sirino noTashreeq Morris, UBrandon Petersen kunamahlebezi okuthi usegixabezwe ngenye inkontileka. Kuvele ukuthi  uNkosingiphile Ngcobo, Glody Lilepo noReeve Frosler banikezwe ezinye izinkontileka ezizophela ngo-2027. Nakuba iChiefs yenze kahle kule sizini kodwa kungabe izigwaza ngowayo uma ingazitshela ukuthi akusekho ekudlalelayo kwazise aMaZulu afuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi awasuki endaweni yesine kwi-log ukuze kufezeke isifiso sikamengameli wawo, uSandile Zungu. UNgcobo uthe balindele umdlalo onzima eMabhida. "Senza okujwayelekile ukulungiselela umdlalo, sicija neqhinga lethu nabaqeqeshi. Kufanele sisebenze kanzima ngoba ngeke kube wumdlalo olula. Siyazi ukuthi AmaZulu angaba yingozi kangakanani njengoba ephekwa ngumqeqeshi u-Arthur (Zwane). Ngakho silindele umdlalo onzima futhi sikulungele ukulwela ukuwina," kusho uNgcobo kwi-website yeChiefs. Nakuba Amakhosi ezoqeda isizini engawinanga neyokubika indebe, okubalwa iNedbank Cup ebiyivikela, kodwa akubuzwa ukuthi abalandeli banelisekile ngokubuyela kweqembu labo kwiCaf. Ngesizini edlule, iChiefs izibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokunqoba iNedbank Cup. "Kumnandi ukwazi ukuthi sizophindela emqhudelwaneni weCaf ngesizini ezayo. Yinto ebesifuna ukuyizuza siyiqembu futhi sijabule ngokuthi sikwenzile lokho kusasele imidlalo emibili. Ngiyajabula kakhulu ngalokho. Kuzoba nzima kodwa sizozuza ngokudlala khona," kusho uNgcobo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI, uConstable Njabulo Cebekhulu BABOSHWE ngalo usuku lwesigameko abesilisa ababili abasolwa ngokudubula babulale iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini endaweni yokucima ukoma eRichmond, ngeSonto. UConstable Njabulo Cebekhulu (32) okuvela ukuthi ungowokudabuka eLovu, kuthiwa udutshulwe wafa ngomunye wabasolwa abeyobakhuza ngokudlala ngesibhamu endaweni evulelekile. Kuvela ukuthi umufi - obengekho emsebenzini - uzwe kukhona okuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi eShames Tavern, wase enikela khona ukuyobheka. Kuthiwa ngesikhathi efika ngaphakathi uthole ukuthi obeqhumisa isibhamu, ubexabana nomunye umuntu, wase eqhumisa isibhamu endaweni ebinabantu. Kuvela ukuthi ngesikhathi ethi uzama ukumkhuza lona wesilisa obeqhumisa isibhamu, uvele wasiphendula wasibhekisa ngakumufi, wamdubula ephindelela. Kuthiwa uphuthunyiswe esibhedlela, nokho wafika waqinisekiswa njengosephangalele. Umufi kuthiwa ubeneminyaka emine esebenzela isiteshi samaphoyisa saseRichmond. IMeya kaMasipala waseRichmond, uMnuz Melikhaya Ngcongo, ithe bakushayela ihlombe ukuboshwa kwabasolwa ngokuphazima kweso. “Umufi obewuthanda umsebenzi wakhe futhi ekukhathalele ukuphepha komphakathi, uhambile waya kumsolwa eyozama ukungenelela. Ngeshwa umsolwa uphendule ngentululwane yezinhlamvu, wamdubula wambulala umsolwa,” kusho uNgcongo. Ubonge ukusebenza ngokuzikhandla kwamaphoyisa, iCommunity Policing Forum (CPF) kanjalo namalungu omphakathi ngokusebenza ngokubambisana, okuholele ekutheni umsolwa nabehamba naye baboshwe ngokushesha. Uthe ukuboshwa kwabasolwa ngokuphazima kweso kuzobuyisa isithunzi kwezomthetho kuphinde kuthumele umyalezo oqinile wokuthi labo abenza amacala afuze lawa bazobhekana nengalo yomthetho. Udalule ukuthi emva kokwenza umuga, umsolwa ube esephanga umufi isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi, wayosilahla. Kuvela ukuthi ngesikhathi uNgcongo ehambela isiteshi samaphoyisa, lapho obekusebenza khona umufi nangesikhathi ehambela endaweni yesigameko, bekusenziwa imizamo yokuthi sicingwe. Ezwelana nomndeni kamufi, uthe amaphoyisa nawo angabantu, umehluko ukuthi abeka impilo yawo engcupheni ukuze kuvikeleke umphakathi. “Sidlulisa okukhulu ukudabuka emndenini, kozakwabo, nakuwo wonke umuntu abesondelene naye. Siyazwelana kakhulu nabo ngokudlula kwakhe sesihluku,” usho kanje. Imizamo yokuthola umndeni kamufi ayiphumelelanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, uthe amaphoyisa aseRichmond aphenya icala lokubulala emva kokuthi iphoyisa ebelingekho emsebenzini lidutshulwe ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma. “Iphoyisa elingu-constable lidutshulwe ngesikhathi lizama ukuphenya ngokuqhuma kwesibhamu obekuqhamuka ngaphakathi engaweni yokucima ukoma,” kusho uMagwaza. Uqhube wathi kube sekuzwakala okunye ukuqhuma kwesibhamu kaningi ngaphakathi endaweni yokucima ukoma, kwase kutholakala ukuthi yiphoyisa selidutshuliwe. “Liphuthunyiswe esibhedlela nokuyilapho elifike lashonela khona,” kusho uMagwaza othe isigameko senzeke ezintatha zangeSonto.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UBUSI Mhlongo uzokhunjulwa kwiStandard Bank Joy of Jazz OWASHIYA umaka emculweni, uBusi "Queen of Maskandi" Mhlongo, uzohlonishwa kwi-27th Standard Bank Joy of Jazz eSandton Convention Centre eGoli ngoSepthemba 25 kuya kumhla ka-26. UBusi wadlula emhlabeni ngoJuni 15, 2010, eneminyaka engu-62, ngenxa yomdlavuza webele owamqala ngo-1978. Leli qhawekazi lizokhunjulwa ngezingoma zalo, ezizobe zihlatshelelwa ngoBuhlebendalo Mda, Zawadi YaMungu noXolisa Dlamini. Esinye isihlabani esizohlonishwa lapha uHugh Masekela, ozokhunjulwa wuThandiswa Mazwai bese uKippie Moeketsi ahlonishwe uKhaya Mahlangu. UThandiswa uthe kumthinte kakhulu ukunikezwa ithuba lokuhlonipha uMasekela ngoba ubudlelwano babo babujulile. "Umculo wakhe awuguqulanga kuphela i-jazz kodwa umoya waleli zwe. Ukuhumusha kabusha umsebenzi wakhe esteji kuyinto enkulu." Kule ndumezulu yomcimbi kuboshelwe izingwazi zakuleli nezasemazweni angaphandle, okubalwa kuzo u-Angelique Kidjo waseBenin nomfuthi we-saxophone waseMelika uKamasi Washington. Amaciko akuleli azobe eshiyelana inkundla nguye uThandiswa, uMcCoy Mrubata, Khaya Mahlangu noNdabo Zulu. KwiDinaledi Stage kuzobe kunandisa o-Ibrahim Maalouf, Judith Sephuma no-Ola Onabule kanti kwiDiphala Stage kuzobe kushiyelana inkundla oNubya Garcia noLorraine Klaasen. KwiConga Stage kuzobe kunandisa oTank, The Bengas, Reza Khota, Madala Kunene noSibusile Xaba. KwiMbira Stage kuzobe kunandisa uNomfusi, Anais Rosso, Floetry, Buhlebendalo Mda, Zawadi YaMungu noXolisa Dlamini. Umdidiyeli walo mcimbi, uMantwa Chinoamadi, uthe iStandard Bank Joy of Jazz yakulo nyaka izokhumbuza abantu ngeminyaka eyadlula bese kubhekwa nekusasa lomculo we-jazz kuleli. Uthe umcimbi walo nyaka uqondaniswe nesikhumbuzo sokuphela kweminyaka engu-50 kwenzeka isibhicongo sabafundi baseSoweto ngoJuni 16, 1976 nesemashi yabantu besifazane ngo-Agasti 9, 1956. Kulindeleke izethameli ezibalelwa ku-25 000.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UDKT Phumelele Basi uthweswe iziqu zobodokotela e-UKZN ngocwaningo lwakhe mayelana nomjolo wezitshudeni emanyuvesi UBUHLE nobubi bokuthandana kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, yizona zethulo ezigqame ocwaningweni lukaDkt Phumelele Basi ezifundweni zakhe zobudokotela asanda kuzethweswa yi-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN). Ngokuthweswa lezi ziqu ze-PhD ye-Gender Education, uDkt Basi (25) waseHlokozi, ogwini oluseningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal, uqophe umlando ngokuthi wuyena obe yisitshudeni esincane kunazo zonke izifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobudokotela kulo nyaka. Isihloko socwaningo lwakhe sithi "Negotiating Heterosexual Relationships on Campus: Female Students Sexual Practices, Desire, Pleasure and Risk at a South African University", okumthathe iminyaka emibili kuphela futhi wakuphasa ngamalengiso. Elandisa ngokumkhuthaze ukucwaninga ngalokhu, uDkt Basi uthe kungenxa yokuthi uhlale ecabanga futhi enemibono ehlukene ngendlela abantu bobulili obehlukene abaphathana ngayo besebenzisa imibono yezindlela zokwenza zamasiko, ukujwayela nangokuphushwa yizimo zabadlule kukho empilweni yabo. “Ngiqinise kakhulu kulokhu sengenza ucwaningo lwami lwe-master’s lapho ebengicwaninga khona ngesimo sabantu abahlale befuna ukuba nemibono ngempilo yabanye, futhi behlale befuna ukuthi izinto ezithile zenzeke ngendlela ethile. Lokho kuholele ekutheni ngiqhubekele ekucwaningeni ukuthi abantu besifazane babhekana kanjani nobudlelwano bothando abangena kubona uma sebesezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme,” kusho uDkt Basi. Ocwaningweni lwakhe ubheka ukuthi abantu besifazane abasebancane baba buthaka futhi bacindezeleke kangakanani othandweni lwabo nabantu besilisa, bese eveza nokuthi uthando olunjalo luba nobuhle, ububi nabungozi buni - ngenhloso yokugqugquzela ukwanda kobudlelwano obunokulingana ngokobulili nokungenabungozi. Uthe akazukuphelela lapha njengoba esevele uhlela ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe ebambisene nabeSouth African Research Chairs Initiative (SARChi) ukuqhubeka acwaninge ngokunye okumayelana nezobulili.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI beLamontville Golden Arrows bejabulela elinye lamagoli abawashaye ngesikhathi behlula iMamelodi Sundowns emdlalweni weDStv Diski Challenge ePolokwane, izolo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-LAMONTVILLE Golden Arrows inyomfe izinhlelo zeMamelodi Sundowns iyehlula emdlalweni weDStv Diski Challenge eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ngeSonto. Abafana Bes'thende abangenelwe yigoli kuqala, bagcine benqobe ngo 3-2. Ngalokhu baphazamise iSundowns obinethuba lokunciphisa igebe lamaphuzu phakathi kwayo ne-Orlando Pirates esesicongweni se-log yeDiski ebingadlali. EZimnyama eziqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-44 emidlalweni engu-18, zithole "iholidi" ngenxa yokuthi bekufanele zidlale neStellenbosch FC ebiyofihla umdlali wayo oshone emasontweni adlule. Lokhu kusho ukuthi zizobuya lisenjalo igebe lamaphuzu ayisihlanu ezilivule phakathi kwazo neSundowns esendaweni yesibili ngawu-39 emidlalweni engu-19. Njengoba sekusobala ukuthi umbango wesicoco seligi uzoba phakathi kweSundowns, Pirates, iSiwelele neStellies, kuzocaca ekugcineni ukuthi amaBrazilians azowakhalela yini amaphuzu ehluleke ukubathola kwi-Arrows emdlalweni obekubhekwe ukuthi iwunqobe. Ukungadlali kweStellies kuholele ekutheni yeqiwe yiSiwelele ecoshe amaphuzu agcwele kwiPolokwane City emdlalweni ewunqobe ngo 3-0. ISiwelele isinyukele endaweni yesithathu kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-34 emidlalweni engu-19. IStellies, eshaya ngabadlali abasha kule sizini, yehlele endaweni yesine ngawu-34. IKaizer Chiefs, ebolekise ngenqwaba yabadlali ewine ngabo iligi ngesizini edlule, iphinde yathola isibhaxu. Ikhale ngaphansi ngo 1-0 kuMaZulu ePolokwane, izolo. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeDStv Diski Challenge: Magesi 0-2 Marumo Gallants; Sekhukhune United 3-0 Orbit College; Polokwane City 0-3 Siwelele; Richards Bay 1-0 Durban City; TS Galaxy 2-0 Chippa United; AmaZulu 1-0 Kaizer Chiefs; Golden Arrows 3-2 Mamelodi Sundowns

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI oKhozini, uNgizwe Mchunu, uphonsele inselelo ubuholi be-ANC eThekwini, ukuba bulalele abantu bakuleli abakhala ngabokufika abangekho emthethweni. UMchunu uthe abaholi kufanele basukumele izikhalazo zabantu abalwa nabokufika abakuleli abangekho emthethweni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ubuholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku, buzomkhalisa kulandela ukungqongqiswa komuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu. Umuzi kaMchunu uthungelwe ngomlilo ngeSonto, kanti ukushiswa kwawo kusolwa ukuthi kuhlobene nemibhikisho yokulwa nabokufika, njengoba uMchunu engomunye wabantu abaphambili kule mibhikisho. Utshele abaholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku ukuthi abantu bakuleli sebekhathele abakufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Siyanicela baholi ukuthi nisilalele. Ngiyazi ukuthi izindlebe zenu ziyaphuza ukuzwa kodwa ngiyacela ukuba nisilalele. Le nto esiyenzayo lapha inokuthula. Siyazi ukuthi nonke nina baholi bezepolitiki niyaphuza ukuzwa." Abaholi be-ANC abebeyokhalisa uMchunu bebeholwa ongumdidiyeli we-ANC eThekwini ophinde abe uSomlomo kuMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz Thabani Nyawose. UMchunu uphonsele uNyawose inselelo ukuba asukumele umonakalo odalwa ngabantu bokufika edolobheni eThekwini. "Baba ngiyazi ukuthi ngelinye ilanga ungase ube yimeya kamasipala njengoba nibekana ngale ndlela enibekana ngayo. Awukwazi ukwenza sengathi awuyiboni le nto eyenzeka edolobheni eThekwini. Amabhilidi angcolile. Abantu bokufika bagwazela izikhulu zoMnyango wezaseKhaya. Bagwazela wonke umuntu." UMchunu uthe kuyamjabulisa ukuthi i-ANC eThekwini isanda kukhipha isitatimende lapho ithe iyayeseka imibhikisho elwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNyawose uthe i-ANC ayinawo umgomo wokuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Abantu abangena emngceleni yethu bengenawo amaphepha abagunyaza ukuthi bangene eNingizimu Afrika, i-ANC iyakugxeka lokho. Lena imfundiso nje eqhutshwa abantu abafuna ukuveza i-ANC njengenhlangano ephambana nehlombe, engasabalaleli abantu." UNyawose uthe bayakugxeka ukushiswa komuzi kaNgizwe, wathi banethemba lokuthi amaphoyisa azobathola ngokushesha abasolwa. I-ANC inikele ngevawusha ka-R10 000 yokuthenga izimpahla zokwakha.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns uMiguel Cardoso NAKUBA kungamhleli kahle umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ukuthi bazobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ephumule ngokwanele kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi bazothambisa kusukela esikimini abazoqala ngaso umdlalo kuya endleleni abazobe behlasela ngayo. UCardoso ukusho lokhu kwabezindaba kulandela ukunweba kwezakhe igebe esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership ngomphumela oncomekayo abawuthole kwiPolokwane City ngeSonto ntambama eLoftus Versfeld Stadium. ISundowns esalelwe yimidlalo yeligi emithathu ishoda ngamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili ukuthi isonge ngesicoco sayo sesishiyagalolunye kulandelana. Indlela yaBafana Ba’Style kumele idlule kwiChiefs abazodlala nayo ngoLwesithathu ngo-7.30 ntambama kuyona le nkundla yasePitoli (Loftus Versveld). Ubhekwe ngabomvu umphumela walo mdlalo weSundowns neChiefs kwazise abaxhubemene ne-Orlando Pirates esendaweni yesibili kwi-log nesele ngomdlalo bawuthatha njengokuyiwona yiwona oyithemba labo lokugcina ngesicoco. “Nakuba bengigxile kwiPolokwane ezinsukwini ezedlule kodwa izinhloli zeqembu seziluqoqe lonke ulwazi esiludingayo ukuze sizothola umphumela ovuna thina kwiChiefs,” kusho uCardoso esithangamini nabezindaba. “Ngeke sikubalekele ukuthi sibhekene neqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu emdlalweni olandelayo ngakho-ke kuyasiphoqa ukuya kuwona ngenhlonipho. “Inhlonipho esithi sizoya ngayo kwiChiefs kayisho ukuthi sizozithambisa kulo mdlalo kumbe sizokwehlisa endleleni esihlasela ngayo kulezi zinsuku. “Isimo esikusona siphoqa ukuthi sihlohle imbudlu yamagoli ngisho ngabe kubekwa liphi iqembu phambi kwethu. “Kubalulekile nokuqaphela ukuthi ezinsukwini ezedlule besimatasatasa nemidlalo enzima nemqoka kodwa iChiefs ibinethuba lonke lokusilungisela njengoba yona yagcina enkundleni ngomdlalo weSiwelele FC (ngo-Ephreli). “Kawukho uphawini wokucasha ngokuthi imidlalo ithothene ngoba sisemabhukwini eSundowns ngakho-ke uma sekuphele lo mdlalo neChiefs ngibheke ukuthi amaphuzu amathathu asale kithina kwazise yithina futhi esidlalela ekhaya,” kusho uCardoso.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ISILOo uMisuzulu Zulu nomkhulumeli waso uMntwana uThulani Zulu UPHIKE wama ngentaba ukuthi iSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini siyadunguzela umkhulumeli waso uMntwana uThulani Zulu kulandela ukuvela kwemibiko. "Hhawu, amanga angaka! Amanga aluhlaza cwe," usho kanje uMntwana uThulani ngesikhathi ethintwa yiSolezwe Ngempelasonto izolo ntambama. "Ngisesikhumulweni sezindiza kodwa iNgonyama benginayo khona manje, kade siphuza itiye." Izolo kusabalale imibiko yokuthi  iSilo singeniswe esibhedlela eThekwini emuva kokuhlabeka kade sihambele eSwatini muva nje. Besithamele imigubho yokuzalwa kukamalume waso uMswati III. USihlalo wekomiti lokuBusa nokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu esiShayamthetho KwaZulu-Natal, uMarlaine Nair, ukhiphe isitatimende  ethi bayibonile imibiko ngokudunguzela kweSilo. "Egameni lekomiti, uSihlalo uMarlaine Nair udlulisa izilokotho ezinhle eSilweni futhi usifisela amandla nokululama okugcwele ngokushesha." Uthe bazobeka iNgonyama, iNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke emithandazweni ngalesi sikhathi. Kwi-voicenote uMntwana uThulani uthe kumphathe kabi ukuzwa "iphutha" ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokuthi iSilo siphuthunyiswe esibhedlela saze safakwa egunjini labagula kakhulu. "Ngifisa ukukubeka kucace ukuthi lokhu kuwuHubhu kaBhejane. ISilo sinakho ukuvakashela odokotela ukuhlola isimo sempilo okwenziwa umuntu wonke njengokujwayelekile. Njengamanje iSilo siyaziqhubekela nemisebenzi yaso esemthethweni noma imisebenzi nje yaso eqondene naso," kusho uMntwana uThulani.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKelebogile "Trivi K" Morake obonakala ohlelweni olukhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic iMageza Want a Wife UBEFUNA indlela ezomenza athembeke kuphathina wakhe uma esemtholile usomatekisi waseSoweto, uKelebogile "Trivi K" Morake (26), ngoLwesihlanu obonakale ohlelweni iMageza Want a Wife, kuMzansi Magic. Lolu hlelo olukhonjiswa ngo-8 ebusuku, uKelebogile uhlangane nabesifazane abaqhamuka emadolobheni ahlukene kuleli nabo abazifunela omaqondana kwezothando. Bonke bazofuna uthando, nokuzothi isonto ngalinye uKelebogile, akhiphe oyedwa kulaba besifazane aze agcine esale nalona amthandayo nazimisele ukuthi amenze unkosikazi wakhe. UKelebogile uthe ubone kungcono athathe enye indlela yokufuna umuntu amthandayo, nazimisele ukuthi athembeke kuye, njengoba efuna kubone izwe lonke ngalokhu akwenzayo ukuthi uqinisile. "Ngaphandle nje kokuthi asinaso isikhathi sokuzikhipha siye ezindaweni la singahlangana khona nabantu esingakha nabo uthando, kuthe uma kuqhamuka ithuba elifana naleli ngabona ukuthi angilisebenzise. Ngizinikele ekutheni ngithole owesifazane ozoba unkosikazi wami ngakhe naye umndeni wami. Ngifuna abantu basazi ukuthi sahlangana kanjani kungakho ngikhethe ukuba yingxenye yalolu hlelo. Ngifuna ukungafihli uma sengimtholile into yethu ngifuna ihlale obala," kusho uKelebogile. Uthe ukwazi kahle ukuthi lokhu akwenzayo indlela engajwayelekile yokufuna uthando, kodwa uzimisele ukuthi athole uthando lweqiniso nomndeni ngayo. "Ababukeli ngeke nje bagcine ngokubona ngifuna uthando ngale ndlela kodwa bazobona uhambo lwami nami olungimangazile njengoba ngibone olunye uhlangothi ngami, bazobona ezinye izindlela engenza ngazo imali izintokazi lezi engizozikhombisa ngaphandle nje kokuba umshayeli wekhumbi, bazohlangana nomndeni wami kanye nempilo engiyiphilayo elokishini, njengoba ngikhulele khona," kuchaza yena. UZanele Mauka, onguphrojusa walolu hlelo, uveze ukuthi ngalo bahlose ukususa indlela endala eke yabonakala kuleli isetshenziswa kuthelevishini yokufuna uthando. Uthe bakhethe le nsizwa ngoba ingumuntu ovulelekile futhi ibifuna ukuba ngomunye wabesilisa abafuna ukushintsha indlela endala yokubheka uthando, benze njengeyesimanje eqhamukayo.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZIDUMBU zabazalwane ababulawelwe ukuba ngamaKhrestu e-Afrika IMIBIKO eshaqisayo idalula ukuthi bangaphezu kuka-200 000 abantu base-Afrika ababulawe ngesihluku, noma badlwengulwa, bathunjwa noma baphoqwa ukuba bashiye amakhaya namabhizinisi abo nyakenye ngenxa yokuba ngamaKhrestu. Lezi zibalo ezithusayo zivezwe esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ngumkhulumeli kazwelonke wenhlangano ezwelana nabantu bakwa-Israel, iSouth African Friends of Israel (SAFI), uMnuz Bafana Modise. Kulesi sitatimende kubhalwe ukuthi phakathi kuka-Ephreli 1 nyakenye nomhla ka-31 Mashi kulo nyaka, imibiko iveze ukuthi luyanda udlame olubhekiswe kubantu abangamaKhrestu emazweni ase-Afrika. Embikweni wekota yokuqala weSAFI mayelana nokuqothwa nokuhlukunyezwa kwamaKhrestu e-Afrika, le nhlamgano iyakuqinisekisa ukuthi angaphezu kuka-200 000 amaKhrestu adabuka e-Afrika avelelwe yilo mshophi phakathi kuka-Ephreli 2025 noMashi 2026. UModise uthe ukusebenzela izinkampani ezinjengeReuters, Africa Centre for Strategic Studies, Open Doors, Vatican News ne-US State Department kukhathule enkulu indima ekuhlanganiseni ucwaningo. Eqhuba uModise uthe kulolu cwaningo kubalwa namaKhrestu angu-180 abulawe yiBarnabas Aid eMiddle Belt eNigeria ngo-Ephreli 2025, angu-200 abulawe eYelwata eBenue State ngoJuni 2025, abazalwane abangu-38 babulawe besesontweni bekhonza eKomanda, empumalanga ye-DRC ngoJulayi 2025, amaKhrestu awu-20 abulawe eNapala eMozambique ngo-Okthoba 2025, ababili ababulawe enkabeni yaseNigeria ngoNovemba 2025, uthisha ongumKhrestu uMnuz Stephen Musili eKenya ngoJanuwari 2026 namaKhrestu angu-17 ase-Ituri, eDRC ngoMashi 2026. Lezi zigameko zilandela isigameko esenzeka ngeSonto lamaSundu nyakenye, senziwa yizihonga zeBoko Haram eNorth Central Nigeria, lapho kwabulawa khona amaKhrestu awu-53. "Esinye isigameko esihlasimulisa umzimba esokuthwalwa kwabesifazane abathwalwa bese bephoqwa ukuba bashadwe ngempoqo njengesikhali sempi. Abesifazane namantombazane bathwalwa amabutho ezempi," kusho uModise. Ngokwesitatimende se-Open Doors' World Watch kulo nyaka, phakathi kuka-Okthoba 1, 2024 noSepthemba 30, 2025, angu-4 849 amaKhrestu abulawelwe inkolo yawo emhlabeni jikelele, awu-4 491 kwabulawa awaseSub-Saharan Africa kwathi amanye angu-3 490 abulawa eNigeria kuphela. Siqhuba isitatimende sithe uMfu Sore waseBurkina Faso uthe amaKhrestu ayadingiswa. "Uma amaphekulazikhuni etheleka emasontweni efica amakholwa ethandaza, awatshela ukuthi isikhathi sobuKhrestu siphelile. Ngakho kufanele abaleke. UMfu Hamza waseCameroon naye uhambe emazwini kaSore. ESINYE sezigameko lapho kuhlaselwa khona ibandla lamaKhrestu KUBA ubumayemaye uma kuhlaselwa amaKhrestu e-Afrika

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Badedelwe ngebheyili abasolwa ngokukhwabanisa eyeCovid -19 Umsolwa oneminyaka engu-48 ubudala ongowokuzalwa eMalawi, uFumu Mkalira Msiska, unkosikazi wakhe oneminyaka engu-48 ubudala, uGladness Msiska Mkhonto, kanye nomlamu wakhe oneminyaka engu-39 ubudala, uBongani Zoran Mkhonto, bavele ngaphambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMiddelburg, ngoMsombuluko, 18 Meyi 2026, ngecala lethenda ye-COVID-19 yohlelo lokusiza abasebenzi (TERS). UMsiska nomkakhe bathole ibheyili ka-R300 000 umuntu emunye, kwathi uBongani Mkhonto yena wathola ibheyili ka-R3 000. Laba bobathathu bazinikele ophikweni oluphenya ngamacala enkohlakalo eNelspruit ngeSonto, mhla ziyi-17 Meyi 2026, kulandela uphenyo olude oluqhutshwa oKlebe, iSpecial Investigating Unit (SIU), i-Unemployment Insurance Fund (UIF), kanye nophiko lweNational Prosecuting Authority (i-AFU) lokudliwa kwempahla. Uphenyo luveze ukuthi inkampani, i-A and F Consulting, kusolakala ukuthi yahlomula ngokungekho emthethweni ku-COVID-19 TERS ngokufuna imali yezisebenzi eziyizipoki ezingaphezu kuka-700 kanye nalabo ababeyizisebenzi. Le nkampani kubikwa ukuthi yathola imali elinganiselwa ku-R26 943 793.19 ngalolu hlelo ngo-2020. Kusolwa ukuthi imali yabe isidluliswa isuka kwa-A and F Consulting yayiswa kuKhulani Quality Contribution, okuyinkampani exhumene nonkosikazi kaMsiska. Umlamu kusolakala ukuthi ubegijima ethola imininingwane yomazisi esetshenziswa ukwenza umkhonyovu wokumangalela abantu abayizipoki nababengabasebenzi bale nkampani. Ngesikhathi sophenyo, i-NPA's Asset Forfeiture Unit yathola incwadi yokumisa ukusebenza kwama-akhawunti asebhange futhi yashaqa izimoto ezinhlanu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kwalondolozwa izakhiwo ezintathu ezisePitoli, eMiddelburg, naseWhite River, kanye nempahla yasendlini kanye nempahla yasehhovisi. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-20 Julayi 2026, ukuze kuqhutshekwe nophenyo. Izindlu ezishaqwe yiNPA zabammangalelwa

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani Mpungose odume ngeleNdlamlenze, usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi obanjelwe eCarnival City, Ekurhuleni, uKhuzani ubehlose ngawo ukujabulisa nokubonga abalandeli bakhe ngawo. Kulo mcimbi obekuvalwe ngomuntu emnyango, amathikithi akhona athengwa aphela kusasele amasonto amathathu kube usuku lomcimbi. Kwacaca ukuthi abalandeli bakaKhuzani bawubheke ngabomvu lo mcimbi. Kuwona bekuboshelwe abaculi abahlukene bakamaskandi iningi labo elishisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku. UKhuzani ubonge abalandeli bakhe ngokuqhubeka bemeseka kulo mcimbi akhipha kuwo unyawo uma kuziwa kumfashini. BEKUGCWELE kuswelakala indawo yokunyathela eCarnival City emcimbini i-Bu Nation Festival ebingoMgqibelo "Sithanda ukubonga kuwona wonke umuntu osesekile ngalo mcimbi. Kodwa esithanda ukukudlulisa ukuthi iCarnival City isincane, abantu bagcine behlala ngaphandle ngenxa yokuthi banethemba lokuthi bazothola amathikithi nendawo ngaphakathi kodwa akwangenzeka lokho. Kusibekele obala lokho ukuthi sidinga indawo enkulu eGauteng, ehambisana nesibalo sethu, " kusho uKhuzani.0 Uveze ukuthi manje badinga indawo ezobavumela ukuthi umcimbi bawenze kuze kube sekuseni, wathi lokhu okwenzeka kuwo kuseyisiqalo, umbono ngalo mcimbi usemkhulu kuye. UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani "Ndlamlenze" Mpungose usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi ube nesasa eGauteng ngempelasonto UKhuzani ubonge abaculi, abaxhasi, abaphathi bohlelo nawo wonke umuntu owenze umcimbi waba impumelelo. Kulo nyaka umsakazi woKhozi FM, uZimiphi Biyela umemezele ukuthi sekungokokugcina ukuthi aphathe uhlelo kuwo njengoba esethi khumu kulo mkhakha. UMCULI kamaskandi, uKhuzani "Ndlamlenze" Mpungose usememezele ukuthi uma kuvuma izimo, umcimbi i-Blu Nation Festival uzoza eThekwini, ngonyaka ozayo. Lo mcimbi ube nesasa eGauteng ngempelasonto

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Image: Sandi Kwon Hoo / DFA Amaphoyisa omgwaqo eLimpopo abambe ibhasi okusolakala ukuthi beligcwele ngokweqile ku-N1 eduze komgwaqo obheke eMashishing, ePolokwane. Leli bhasi, elisuka eMalawi liya eGoli, linelayisensi yokulayisha abagibeli abangu-70 kodwa kuthiwa belithwele abantu abangu-90. Iziphathimandla ziphinde zathola ukuthi uhlu lwabagibeli lukhombisa abagibeli abangu-25 kuphela. Izikhulu zakwa-SAPS kanye nezoMnyango wabokufika babizelwe endaweni yesigameko kanti uphenyo lusaqhubeka. UMnyango wezokuThutha nokuPhepha koMphakathi eLimpopo uxwayise ngokuthi ukugcwala ngokweqile kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini wathi abomthetho bazoqhubeka nokubhekana nokuphulwa kwemithetho yezokuphepha emgwaqeni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Lenyukile izinga labangasebenzi kuleli Image: Ron Lach/Pexels PHEZU kokuba linyukile izinga labantu abangasebenzi kuleli, kodwa kunenhlansi yethemba KwaZulu-Natal kunyuka isibalo sabantu abatohozayo. Izinga lokungasebenzi linyuke laya ku-32.7% ekoteni yokuqala ka-2026, lisuka ku-31.4% ekoteni yesine yango-2025. Lezi zibalo zimenyezelwe nguMnuz Risenga Maluleke, iStatistician-General kwiStats SA, izolo. UMaluleke uthe kulahleke imisebenzi engu-345 000, kanti sesimi ku-16.8 million isibalo sabantu abasebenzayo kuleli. "I-KZN yisona sodwa isifundazwe esinyukelwe izinga labantu abasebenzayo ngabangu-6 000. Isifundazwe esehlelwe kakhulu yizinga labasebenzayo yiNorth West ngabangu-80 000, kulandele iGauteng ngabangu-67 000 neMpumalanga ngabangu-54 000." Uthe sinyukile nesibalo sentsha eneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-24, engasebenzi. "Lingu-60.9% izinga lentsha eneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-24 engasebenzi kuleli. Sinyuke saya ku-8.1 million isibalo sabantu abangasebenzi kuleli. Intsha iyona ebhekene nengwadla yokungasebenzi," usho kanje. Uthe kwabaneminyaka engu-25 kuya ku-34, izinga lokungasebenzi limi ku-40.6%. Ukhale nangokuthi sinyukile nesibalo salabo abalahle ithemba lokuthola umsebenzi saya ku-3.9 million. Uqhube wathi kuseva ukuyamamisa ukwehla kwemisebenzi nempi eqhubeka eMiddle East. Iqembu i-EFF ligxeke i-ANC ngokunyuka kwesibalo sabangasebenzi. Leli qembu lithe uKhongolose umatasa uvikela uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ezinkingeni abhekene nazo walaxaza abantu abangasebenzi. I-ActionSA ihlabe ikhwelo kuRamaphosa ukuthi axoshe bonke ongqongqoshe abakwiGNU ababhebhezela inkinga yokungasebenzi. "Sizobhalela uRamaphosa simnxuse ukuthi athathe izinyathelo ezinqala kongqongqoshe bezomnotho abahlulwa umsebenzi. Abantu abakwazi ukuthembela entweni engekho yokuthi ngelinye ilanga bayothola umsebenzi." Imikhakha okulahleke inqwaba yemisebenzi kubalwa ethinta ezokwakha, ezokuthutha neyasezindlini. Okukhule kuyona imisebenzi eyokukhiqiza, izimayini kanjalo nezolimo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI weZwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa USAZOQHUBEKA nokuqhoqhobala isikhundla uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, oveze ukuthi uzophonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende ukuba liphenye ngokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. URamaphosa uveze ukuthi uzonikela enkantolo eyophonsela inselelo lo mbiko owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona okufanele akuphendule ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ethula inkulumo, ngoMsombuluko ebusuku. IPhalamende lawuchitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Kepha ngoLwesihlanu iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ichithe isinqumo sePhalamende sokunqaba umbiko wethimba. URamaphosa uthe uyasihlonipha isinqumo senkantolo kodwa wathi umbiko wethimba elalijutshwe iPhalamende unamaphutha. "Nginqume ukuphonsela inselelo umbiko wethimba. Angikwenzi lokhu ngoba nakhu ngingalihloniphi ikomiti kodwa ngenza lokhu ngoba ngikholelwa ukuthi kunamaphutha embikweni wethimba." URamaphosa uthe umbiko wethimba ugcwele izinto ezingenabufakazi. "Inzwabethi yonke lena equkethwe umbiko wethimba." URamaphosa uthe angeke ashiye esikhundleni. "Kukhona abathi angisule esikhundleni. Akukho lapho khona inkantolo ethe nginecala. Ngizimisele ukuqhubeka ngihole abantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Muningi umsebenzi osangihlalele."

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe USIYABONGA Mbongo waMajimbos ebanga ibhola noMouhamed Wagne weSenegal emdlalweni we-Afcon Under 17 eMohammed VI Complex, eRabat, ngoLwesine LIVULE ngonyawo oluhle liqoqa amaphuzu aphelele iqembu lesizwe lika-Under 23, Amajimbos, liguqisa iSenegal emdlalweni ka-Group D we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) Under 17 ngoLwesine kusihlwa eComplex Mohammed VI Pitch 3, eRabat, eMorocco. ISenegal yiyona ebone inethi kuqala ngesiwombe sokuqala ngegoli elivalelwe phakathi uCheik Thior ngomzuzu ka-44. Nokho Amajimbos abuye ngesivuthevuthe ngesiwombe sesibili u-Inganathi Simama eshaya elokulinganisa ngomzuzu ka-48. Ukucindezela kwaMajimbos kuthele izithelo ethola igoli lesibili ngomzuzu ka-55 umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya uThior ezama ukususa umhlola ekhaya. Amajimbos aqhathwe neSenegal, Algeria neGhana kuGroup D. Azobuyela ensimini ngokubhekana ne-Algeria ngeSonto ngo-5 ntambama kulo mqhudelwano we-Afcon U-17 oqale ngoLwesithathu, ozosongwa ngoJuni 2. Kulo mqhudelwano waseMorocco, Amajimbos adinga ukufinyelela kuma-quarterfinal ukuze ezophinda azibekisele indawo koweNdebe yoMhlaba ka-Under 17 ezodlalelwa eQatar, ngoNovemba 19 kuya kuDisemba 13. Nanyakenye leli qembu laMajimbos lafinyelela kowamanqamu kwi-Afcon eyayiseMorocco, lapho laguqiswa khona ngosokhaya ngo 3-1. Sekungumlando ukuthi iqembu laseMorocco yilona elagcina lidla isicoco se-Afcon ngokuguqisa iMali ngo 4-2 sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INKANTOLO eNkulu yasePitoli ivune umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ecaleni lokuhlanjalazwa uNgizwe Mchunu INKANTOLO eNkulu yasePitoli iphinde yavuna umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, kwelokwehliswa isithunzi ngumengameli wamabhinca, uNgizwe Mchunu izolo. UNgizwe ubevele enkantolo eyokwethula olwakhe uhlangothi ngokuthi kungani inkantolo kufanele iwushaye indiva umyalelo wayo ngokuthi kufanele axolise esidlangalaleni, angaphinde akhulume izinkulumo ezehlisa uMalema isithunzi bese ekhokha zonke izindleko zabameli. UMchunu wehlulekile ukunikeza izizathu ezizwakalayo zokuthi kungani kufanele inkantolo iguquke emyalelweni wayo wesikhashana. Inkantolo yagcina isifinyelela ekutheni lo myalelo iwenze waba ngowokugcina. Kuthiwa kufanele enze i-video axolise kuMalema bese ehoxisa akusho ngaye. Inkantolo iyalele ukuthi le video kufanele ayifake emithonjeni lapho okwavela khona lena ayehlisa ngayo uMalema isithunzi. Ibe isimyalela ukuthi akhokhe izindleko zabameli bakaMalema. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, uMchunu wayebonakale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana emasontweni edlule ethi uMalema njengoba evuna abokufika, ebeseka, yingoba uhlomula imali engango-R60 milion kwabaseNigeria abahweba ngezidakamizwa. Wamsola ngokusebenzisa amandla akhe ezepolitiki ukuvikela abokufika ababandakanyeka ebugebengwini. Ekhuluma nabezindaba ngaphandle kwenkantolo uNgizwe uthe akekho ongazi ukuthi uMalema ubehlale ebathuka abantu ngaphakathi, nangaphandle kwePhalamende. Uthe yena akaze amthuke, kodwa ubekhuluma iqiniso alaziyo. “Abasibopheke okungcono, sihlale ejele. Asingavumi uMalema asiphazamise embhidlangweni wethu wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho,” kusho uNgizwe, ophinde wezwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngokubekwa kwenkosi yabaseSomalia eGoli. “Basebenzise ngisho uphawu lwethu, i-coat of arm, okuyiyona ngubo yethu yokuthandaza. Ingubungcwele bethu bokuthi ekugcineni inkululeko isifikile,” usho kanje. UNgizwe ubesekwe amabutho kanjalo nabanye abakuleli. Phakathi kwabo bekukhona noNkosikhona "Phakelumthakathi" Ndabandaba, othe babonga bonke abaphume ngobuningi ukuzokweseka uNgizwe, wathi bacela abaholi bakuleli ukuthi banake into eqondene nezwe iNingizimu Afrika. Uthe uMthethosisekelo, obhalwe ngaphakathi ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika eyawo wonke umuntu ohlala kuyo, ngaphandle ibhalwe ukuthi uMthethosisekelo waseNingizomu Afrika, okusho ukuthi okungaphakathi kukhuluma ngabakuleli. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi ikhuluma ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika hhayi abantu bakwenye indawo. Abantu abayeke ukuhlanekezela uMthethosisekkelo wethu,” kusho uPhakela. Uqhube wathi bazokulwela ukuthi uMthethosisekelo ukusuka manje kubhekwe phambili uyashintshwa. “Ngeke sivume ukuthi uMalema athi abokufika abangenamaphepha, abenzelwe amaphepha ngoba nakhu yena evikela ibhizinisi lakhe elingaphandle kwezwe esingazi ukuthi lisemthethweni yini njengoba sizwa kuthiwa bakha ugwayi ongekho emthethweni,” kusho uPhakela. Usole uMalema ngokuthi ufike athi abantu abazithathele umhlaba, uma sebekwenzile lokho, kuphinde kuthunyelwe inkampani yakhe yonogadla iyobabhidlizela Uthe njengoba abokufika bezibeka beba amakhosi, yingoba bezwa amanzi ngobhoko. Abebekhaphe uNgizwe, bebehambe becula iculo elithi: “UMalema uyadelela, akashaywanga.”

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns uLebo Mothiba ongenabo abalandeli abaningi ABAKHOHLWE ukuthi bazophumelela abazama ukunyundela umgadli weMamelodi Sundowns, uLebo Mothiba, kumqeqeshi waleli qembu laseChloorkop, uMiguel Cardoso, ngoba ngeke baphumelele. Lawa ngamazwi kaCardoso awatshele abezindaba ngenhloso yokuvikela uMothiba odlale ngephenathi ngesikhathi benqoba ngengcacamezela ka 1-0 kwiPolokwane City ngoLwesithathu ebusuku eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane. Bekumqoka ukuthi iSundowns inqobe ngamagoli angaphezulu kwelilodwa njengoba isemjahweni wesicoco seligi oshisa phansi ne-Orlando Pirates. Ngokunqoba kwiPolokwane, leli qembu laseChloorkop libuyele esicongweni se-log. ISundowns inethuba lokulinweba igebe lamaphuzu lihlale kwamahlanu esicongweni njengoba izophinda nePolokwane ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. UMothiba obesanda kungena usize iSundowns ngokuyakhela igoli elishaywe nguMarcelo Allende egcine inqobe ngalo. Emuva kwalokho, wehlulwe wukushaya phakathi iphenathi evinjwe ngonyawo ngunozinti wePolokwane ezama ukuyikha ngendlela esakutayela. Ukuyishaya phakathi kwakhe bekuzokwehlisa isikweletu samagoli abasele ngawo kwiPirates. Kuqale usaqhubeka umdlalo ukugxekwa kukaMothiba ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngendlela athathe ngayo iphenathi. Kusukela uMothiba afika kwiSundowns esuka eFrance ngesizini edlule akukho okutheni asekwenzele leli qembu. Okugqamile ngoMothiba ngukuthi ungomunye wabadlali azifelayo ngabo uCardoso kodwa iSundowns usayishayele igoli elilodwa kule sizini emidlalweni yeligi engu-11. Kunemidlalo lapho uCardoso edlalisa khona uMothiba ngisho kubonakala ukuthi kudingeka ijubane lika-Iqraam Rayners (ongawuqedanga umdlalo wePolokwane). UCardoso uzichaze njengomuntu ongayibonanga kahle indlela uMothiba athathe ngayo iphenathi kodwa ubengakungabazi ukuthi ukungangeni kwayo bekungaxhumene nokuzithwala komdlali kumbe izinga lakhe. “Kabakhohlwe abacabanga ukuthi bazonyundela uMothiba kimina ngoba ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka kulokhu esizama ukukwenza kwiSundowns,” kusho uCardoso. “Kangingabazi ukuthi ubezama ukuyishaya phakathi iphenathi futhi akayigejanga ngoba etayela kumbe ekhombisa izimpawu zokuzithela ngabandayo. “Iwini esiyitholile ivele ngaye uMothiba, ngakho-ke abacabanga ukuthi kukhona okuzoshintsha ngenxa yephenathi kabakhohlwe ngoba lokho ngeke kwenzeke."

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, besesikhungweni i-Forensic Science Laboratory, evulwe ngoLwesihlanu, eMayville Image: Leon Lestrade/Independent Newspapers ZIYIFANISE nokunqoba kwesifundazwe empini yobugebengu obubucayi, eyokuvulwa kweForensic Science Laboratory (FSL), eMayville, eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini, zithe le laboratory enikezelwe nguNgqongqoshe wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dean Mcpherson kwibamba likaNgqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa kuzwelonke, uSolwazi Firoz Cachalia, ibuyisa ithemba empini yokulwa nobugebengu esifundazweni. Phakathi kokunye okuningi okuyamaniswa nophenyo lwamacala, izoba yisikhungo esizohlola amasampula olibofuzo oluqondene namacala okudlwengula enzeka esifundazweni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi phambilini, amasampula alolu hlobo abethunyelwa esikhungweni esenza umsebenzi ofanayo esisePitoli. Lokhu bekuholela ekutheni kube khona izikhalo ngamacala abucayi afana nawokudlwengula njengoba bekuhlale kuvela ukuthi uyaphela nonyaka imiphumela yolibofuzo ingabuyile. Lokhu kuthiwa bekudalwa ukuthi lesi sikhungo senza umsebenzi osuke ulethwe nangezinye izifundazwe. Umsunguli weThekwini Neighbourwood Watch, eqapha ubugebengu emalokishini ehlukene eThekwini, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe ukuvulwa kwesikhungo kuwukunqoba eyobugebengu esifundazweni. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi uphenyo olumaqondana nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo emacaleni okudlwengula, seluzoyeka ukushaya ngonyawo lonwabu, lokhu kusho ukushesha kokutholakala kobulungiswa kubagilwa bokudlwengulwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo,” kusho uJali. Uthe indaba yokwethembela esikhungweni ebesisePitoli, bekubalahlekisela ngethemba abagilwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo. “Umuntu ubefike adlwengule, aboshwe, bathi bayabona abagilwa nemindeni yabo, usededelwe, usezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, kube sengathi ezobulungiswa zibenzela phansi." Uthe uma kwenzeka okufuze lokhu imiphakathi igcina isola amaphoyisa ngokuthi ehlulekile ukwenza umsebenzi wawo ekubeni kungekho asuke angakwenza ukuphuthumisa uhlelo lokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Uqhube wathi abakubhekile manje ukushesha kokuphothulwa kwamacala okudlwengula enkantolo njengoba kungasekho okuzoba yisithiyo ophenyweni oluqondene nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Isolezwe likhumbule iziwombe ezimbalwa ezike zenzeka lihambele amanye amacala ezinkantolo ezehlukene eThekwini. Kwesinye isiwombe esenzeka eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, eminyakeni embalwa edlule, kwangena icala lokudlwengulwa kowesifazane lapho imantshi eyayilisingethe yakhombisa okukhulu ukunengeka ngokuhamba kwesikhathi eside ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. “Leli cala ngiyalihoxisa okwesikhashana. Sekuphele inqwaba yezinyanga ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. Ukuthi uhulumeni waseNingizimu Afrika uyahluleka ukulungisa inkinga yokubambezeleka kwemiphumela yolibofuzo e-laboratory, akuyona inkinga yami leyo noma ekamsolwa,” kwasho imantshi. Yaqhuba yathi ukumgcina ngaphakathi esitokisini umsolwa ngesikhathi kusalindwe imiphumela yolibofuzo okungaziwa ukuthi iyobuya nini, kuwukucindezela amalungelo akhe. Ngaleso sizathu, yamdedela, yathi necala iyalihoxisa, lobuye livulwe uma  sekubuye imiphumela yolibofuzo. Kwenzeka esifanayo eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma, nyakenye, lapho okwakuboshwe khona uthisha wasesikoleni iMtapo High, eLindelani, ngecala lokudlwengula umfundi, wamkhulelisa. Imantshi yavele yamdedela ngaphandle kokuthandabuza, ithi vele kusazothatha eside isikhathi ukuthi icala liqulwe njengoba kwakusazolindwa imiphumela yolibofuzo, okungaziwa ukuthi izobuya nini ePitoli.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: UJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, udutshulwe wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe Ngemuva kokusinda esigamekweni sokudutshulwa ngesonto eyedlule, uJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu udutshulwe wabulawa NgoMgqibelo emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe eMkhuhlu, eMpumalanga. Kubikwa ukuthi abesilisa ababili baphume emotweni eyiveni emhlophe, bangena emagcekeni ebhizinisi likaJoseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, 62, eMkhuhlu bamdubula bambulala ngoMeyi 16. Ngokwemibiko, uNyalungu phambilini wasinda kwesinye isigameko ngoMeyi 8 waphuthunyiswa esibhedlela iMatikwana. Le nsizwa yaziwa ngokuba yinkosi yabazibgeli bobhejane abangekho emthethweni yayiyiphoyisa ngaphambi kokwenza lomsebenzi eMpumalanga. UNyalungu ubesematheni eminyakeni edlule kulandela ukuboshwa okumataniswa nokubulawa kobhejane. Amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga akuqinisekisile ukuthi aphume umkhankaso wokuthungatha ababulali kulandela isigameko sokudutshulwa kwendoda eneminyaka engu-62 ubudala eMkhuhlu ngoMgqibelo, ngabo-2.30 ntambama. Okhulumela amaphoyisa aseMpumalanga uColonel Mavela Masondo uthe, ngokolwazi lokuqala, abasolwa ababili baphume evenini emhlophe baqonda kumufi ehlezi nabanye abantu emagcekeni ebhizinisi lakhe. "Isisulu sizame ukubaleka, kodwa abasolwa basilandele futhi kusolakala ukuthi badubule kaningi bebhekise kuso ngaphambi kokuba babaleke endaweni yesigameko ngesivinini esiphezulu ngemoto efanayo." Uthe umufi uhlonzwe ngabezempilo endaweni yesigameko. “Umufi wadutshulwa walimala endaweni efanayo ngesonto eledlule.” Uqhubeke wathi imbangela yokubulawa kwakhe ibingakaziwa okwamanje. Nokho kuvulwe icala lokubulala kanti uphenyo lusaqhubeka.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-MILFORD FC neCape Town City bazibekisele indawo kumaPSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokuthola amaphuzu amqoka abebewadinga emidlalweni yokusonga isizini ka-2025/26 yeMotsepe Foundation Championship edlalwe izolo, ezinkundleni ezahlukene. IMilford ibambane ngo 0-0 neHungry Lions eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington, ngenkathi iCity ibhaxabula iLeceisterford City ngo 4-2 eDobsonville Sadium, eSoweto. IMilford ibidinga iphuzu kulo mdlalo wayo neLions ukuqinisekisa indawo yayo kumaPlay-Offs. Iqede isizini isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-54 okuyisibalo esifanayo neseCity eqede endaweni yesibili ngenxa yomehluko wamagoli. ICasric Stars nayo ebingelinye lamaqembu abesembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs, akuyisebenzelanga ukunqoba kwayo ngo 3-1 kwiGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. IKruger United edlale ngokulingana ibambana ngo 2-2 ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, eNelspruit, inikwe ngokusemthethweni indebe yayo nezindondo ngokuba ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Ngesizini ezayo isiyogijima kwiBetway Premiership ICity neMilford sebelinde iqembu lePremiership abazodlala nalo kumaPlay-Offs azoqala ngoMeyi 26, asongwe ngoJuni 13. Leli qembu kulindeleke ukuthi liphume emaqenjini amane emuva kwemidlalo yokusonga isizini yePremiership ngoMgqibelo, okuyi okuyiMagesi FC, Orbit College, Marumo Gallants neChippa United. IMilford eqeqeshwa nguXanti Pupuma, kungokokuqala izibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs. Nakuba igcine iphunyukwe yisicoco seligi ngemuva kokuhlala esicongweni se-log isikhathi eside kodwa akubuzwa ukuthi kuzoyithoba ukuthola elinye ithuba ngamaPlay-Offs. Leli qembu laseRichards Bay lihambe ibanga elide emqhudelwaneni weNedbank Cup, laguqiswa yi-TS Galaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. Ukuphumelela kweStallions ukungena kwiPremiership kuyobe sekusho ukwanda kwesibalo samaqembu aseBay kulesi sigaba esikhulu kwazise iRichards Bay FC yilona kuphela iqembu lakule ndawo elisayibambe kulesi sigaba. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, i-The Citizens eqeqeshwa uJan Vreman negqishe ngeningi labadlali abanamava amaPlay-Offs, yithuba layo lokuzabalazela ukubuyela kwiPremiership njengoba ngesizini edlule igawulwe yizembe idlala wona amaPlay-Offs kulandela ukuqeda kwayo endaweni ka-15 kwi-log. Imiphumela yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Casric Stars 3-1 Gomora United; Kruger United 2-2 The Bees; Leicesterford City 2-4 Cape Town City; Hungry Lions 0-0 Milford FC; Venda FC 1- 2 Highbury; Lerumo Lions 4-0 Black Leopards; University of Pretoria 6-2 Midlands Wanderers; Baroka FC 0-0 Upington City

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUDILIZWE uSomlomo woMasipala wasoPhongolo, uNkk Celiwe Nxumalo-Sibiya, obengakaqedi nesonto eqokelwe esikhundleni. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wehliswe esikhundleni yisinqumo seNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu esithi umhlangano aqokwa kuwo wawungekho emthethweni. Isinqumo senkantolo siphume ngeledlule. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya, oyikhansela le-ANC, waqokwa emhlanganweni owawusemasontweni amabili edlule. Ukuqokwa kwakhe kwamangaza abaningi ngenxa yokuthi i-IFP iyona ephethe umkhandlu njengoba inamakhansela angu-14 kwangu-29 emkhandlwini. I-IFP ivota ne-DA enekhansela elilodwa kulo mkhandlu. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wakhethwa ngo-elethu ngenxa yokuthi amakhansela ayisishiyagalombili  e-IFP awezanga kulo mhlangano ngenxa yezinsolo zokuthi ayengahambisani negama lobuholi be-IFP obabufuna ukuthi aqokelwe esikhundleni. Ubuholi be-IFP babuyalele amakhansela eqembu ukuba akhethe uMnuz Ndukisebandla Mavuso, ukuba abe usomlomo womkhandlu. Isikhundla sasikade siphethwe uMnuz Kwenzakakufani Nxumalo, owayalelwa ubuholi be-IFP ukuba asule esikhundleni. Okhulumela uMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Senzelwe Mzila, uthe iJaji Nontuthuzelo Mlaba lichithe zonke izinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni okwaqokwa kuwo uNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya njengosomlomo. "Inkantolo iyalele uMphathiswa (uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi) ukuba ahlele umhlangano okuzoqokwa kuwo usomlomo ukuze kungeke kuphazamiseke ukusebenza komkhandlu." Inkantolo iphinde yachitha nezinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu owawungo-Ephreli 7 kanye nowawungo-Ephreli 28. UMzila uthe le mihlangano yabanjwa ngaphandle kokulandela imigomo elawula imihlangano yomkhandlu. Inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi imenenja yomkhandlu ebhekene nezinsolo zenkohlakalo, uMnuz Mntonjani Bethuel Khali, ingalubhadi emahhovisi omkhandlu. UMzila uthe inkantolo iyalele uKhali ukuba angalinge aqhubeke nokuzenza imenenja yomkhandlu noma anikeze abasebenzi bomkhandlu imiyalelo. UKhali wamiswa emva kwezinsolo zenkohlakalo kodwa wabuye wabuyiselwa emsebenzi. UMzila uthe isikhulu somnyango esajutshwa ukuba siyobamba kwesokuba imenenja yomasipala ngoMashi, uMnuz Khulekani Ngcobo, isona esizoqhubeka nokubamba isikhundla. UMzila uthe isinqumo senkantolo sizoqinisekisa ukuthi uyalandelwa umthetho kuMasipala wasoPhongolo.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: USANELE 'Tornado' Msimang waseNtshanga, okungenzeka ahoxe empini okulindeleke axhimfane kuyona nowayengumpetha womhlaba, uXolisani 'Nomeva' Ndongeni waseMthatha Image: Isithombe:SITHUNYELWE KUBANJWE umoya ngokulungela impi komshayisibhakela waseNtshanga, uSanele "Tornado" Msimang, okuvele ukuthi ushiswe ngamanzi abilayo ngeSonto. UMsimang ongumpetha we-WBF International Super Lightweight uzobhekana noXolisani "Nomeva" Ndongeni owayeyingqwele kwi-International Boxing Organisation (IBO) Lightweight eJan Smuts Stadium, KuGompo City, ngoMeyi 23. Le mpi okungeyokuvalelisa kwezamankomane kaNdongeni, ingeyosuku kwezihlelwe yiGround Up Boxing Promotions. UMsimang usayine isivumelano sokubhekana noNdongeni emuva kwesikhathi eside lo mshayisibhakela waseMthatha engayitholi imbangi azoxhimfana nayo empini yokuvalelisa phambi kwabalandeli bakhe endaweni aqala kuyona isibhakela esikhokhelayo ngo-2010. UMsimang utshele leli phephandaba ukuthi ushiswe ngamanzi abilayo esandleni nasesiswini, waphuthunyiswa esibhedlela ngeSonto ebusuku. Lo mshayisibhakela osehlulwe kabili ezimpini zesicoco saseMzansi, usehlala kwaPata, eMgungundlovu, lapho enesitolo khona. "Ngisola ukuthi le nto ihlangene nombango oqhubekayo ngendaba yesitolo. Kukhona umuntu owayenesitolo ngaphambi kokuthi ngisivule nami kodwa wasiyeka. Emuva kwesikhathi, wabuya wasivula futhi kodwa abantu bangayingena indaba yakhe, baqhubeka nokuthenga kwesami. NgeSonto ebusuku bengibilisa amaqanda amathathu. Esebilile ngesehlisile isitofu. Emuva kwalokho, ngizwe iqanda liqhumisa okwesibhamu, amanzi angithela esandleni nasesiswini. Inyama yakulezi zindawo ibizihambela. Bangishaye ngovutha," kusho uMsimang. "Namuhla (izolo) udokotela ungibuzile ukuthi ngifuna kanganani ukuyolwa le mpi, ngamtshela ukuthi ngizimisele kakhulu. Uthe uzonginika kusuka namuhla kuze kube ngoLwesithathu, abone ukuthi isimo sami sinjani. Emuva kwalokho, uzobe esekhipha incwandi eqinisekisa ukuthi ngeke ngikwazi ukulwa uma isimo singesihle. Ungiyale ngokuthi ngingangcweki nabanye abashayisibhakela okwamanje kuze kube kuyaphola kahle esandleni." Kulezi zimpi, umpetha we-SA Featherweight uLindelani "TWT" Sibisi uzovikela ibhande kuBongani Fule wase-Eastern Cape. Kwenye impi ebhekwe ngabomvu, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene uzobanga ibhande le-IBO Minimumweight noNhlanhla "Kilimanjalo" Tyirha wase-Eastern Cape.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: AMAKHOSI ahlukene ahlangane nezikhulu zeKhomishini yoKhetho eKZN izolo ISIKHULU seKhomishini yezoKhetho KwaZulu-Natal, uNkk Ntombifuthi Masinga, emhlanganweni neNdlu yobuHoli boMdabu esifundazweni izolo ZIBUYA ziphindelela KwaZulu-Natal izikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC), zizohlangana nabaholi abehlukene. Lezi zikhulu zisemkhankasweni wokuhlanganisa amehlo nabaholi abehlukene njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba 4, 2026. Namhlanje izikhulu zizohlangana nomholi webandla lakwaShembe, ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni, uMduduzi "Nyazilwezulu" Shembe. Akukapheli sikhathi esingakanani izikhulu zisesifundazweni,zihlangane naneSilo samaBandla, uMisuzulu kaZwelithini. Isitatimende se-IEC sithe uSihlalo weKhomishini, uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uzohlangana noNyazi KwaMhlabuyalingana. Sithe izolo abaholi bebehlangane neNdlu yabaHoli boMdabu esifundazweni. "NgoLwesithathu, bazohlangana neKhabhinethi. Umhlangano uzoba seMgungundlovu," kusho i-IEC. Sithe le mihlangano eyokuhlanganisa nezinhlaka ezehlukene zobuholi, ukuzinzisa intando yabantu kuleli. "I-IEC iqinisa ubudlelwano nezinhlaka ezehlukene njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni. IKhomishini isike yahlangana ngisho nabaholi bamaqembu ezepolitiki." IKhomishini ibuya iphindelela kulesi sifundazwe nje, umbiko wocwaningo olwenziwa yikhomishini, waveza ukuthi abantu bakuleli sebelahle ithemba abasenamdlandla ngezinto ezithinta ukhetho. Lo mbiko waveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe, yibona asebelahle ithemba kakhulu ekuvoteni. Yingakho izikhulu zibuya ziphindelela ukuze zinxenxe abaholi ukuthi bagqugquzele abantu ukuthi babambe iqhaza okhethweni. Emuva komhlangano nezikhulu zekhomishini, iMbube yanxusa ukuthi abantu besifundazwe bavote njengoba kuza ukhetho. Okunye abantu abanxuswa ukuthi bakwenze ukubhalisela ukuvota ngenyanga ezayo. Ikhomishini ivule ithuba ngempelasonto yangoJuni 20 no-21, ukuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Kumanje abantu bayanxuswa ukuthi bazibheke ukuthi babhalisele kuphi ukuvota. Banxuswa kanje ngoba okhethweni oluzayo, umuntu uvota lapho ebhalise khona, akakwazi ukuvota noma yikuphi ngoba kusuke kukhethwa abaholi abazohola emphakathini.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMDLALI wasemuva weBafana Bafana, uKhulumani Ndamane, owenze amaphutha amabili aholele ekutheni kungene amagoli ngesikhathi bebhekene neSiwelele FC ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NAKUBA umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, evuma ukuthi kawazibeki amaphutha akamuva kaKhulumani Ndamane kodwa ngeke ayeke ukusibophela lesi sitobha ngoba yisona sodwa angakwazi ukusisebenzisa kulezi zinsuku. ISundowns izosonga isizini yeBetway Premiership namuhla ngokubhekana ne-TS Galaxy ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Iwini yeSundowns kwiGalaxy izoyigcina esicongweni ngamaphuzu amagu-71, bese konke kulala kwi-Orlando Pirates yona ezosalelwa ngemibili. IPirates enamaphuzu angu-65 endaweni yesibili, izoqala umdlalo wayo neDurban City ngoMgqibelo ekhaya, seyikuqonda kahle ekudingayo ukuze iqede indlala yeminyaka engu-14 yesicoco seligi. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba emuva kokunqoba kweSundowns ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele ngempelasonto, uCardoso uvumile ukuthi uNdamane wenza amaphutha asobala kulezi zinsuku. Kumagoli amane ashaywe yiSiwelele abukeka ezoba wusizo kwiPirates, uNdamane wenze amaphutha amabili lapho ephasele khona isitha kwangena amagoli amabili. Ngaphambi kwalokho, udale iphenathi sekuyophela umdlalo ngesikhathi bembambana ngo 1-1 neStellies. “Okusobala ngoNdamane ngukuthi ukhombisa izimpawu zokukhathala hhayi emzimbeni kuphela kepha nasemqondweni okwenza kube sengathi usalela emuva uma kufanele enze lokhu akujwayele,” kusho uCardoso. “Inkinga esinayo ngukuthi nguyena kuphela isitobha esikhona kwezamaphakathi nenkundla esikwazi ukudlala ngonyawo lwesinxele." Nakuba uCardoso emvikela uNdamane kodwa kungenzeka ukuthi amaphutha akamuva amlahlekisele ngengqayizivele yethuba lokuyodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. UNdamane ngomunye wabadlali okubhekwe ukuthi bathole indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana sabadlali ababalelwa ku-55 umqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, azoqoka kubona esezoya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba obekulindeleke ukuthi sihanjiswe kwiFifa. Izolo bekuwusuku lokugcina lwamaqembu esizwe lokuhambisa kwiFifa lolu hlwa lwabadlali okuthiwa kufanele lube nonozinti okungenani abane. Okusemqoka ngalolu hla wukuthi akekho umdlali ongekho kulona ozoqhamuka esefakwa kweseNdebe yoMhlaba ngisho ngabe kukhona abalimalayo kulelo qemu lesizwe. NgoMeyi 25, amaqembu ayaphoqwa ukuba adedele abadlali bawo abasemaqenjini esizwe aya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eCanada, Mexico nase-United States of America (USA). Lolu suku seluyolandelwa nguJuni 1 noma 2 lapho iFifa iyomemezela khona wonke amaqembu esizwe abadlali abangu-23.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo KwaBaba ozoqala kuMzansi Magic ngenyanga ezayo, owethulwe kwabezindaba ngoLwesihlanu UMLINGISI waseMlaza, uVuyo Biyela, uthi intsha eningi yesilisa izozibona kumlingisi uZwelakhe Mkhize, ozobonakala emdlalweni owuchungechunge othi KwaBaba, ozoqala ukukhonjiswa kuMzansi Magic ngoJuni 1, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. Lona ngomunye wemidlalo Isolezwe elike labika ngawo, njengoba lathola ukuthi usaqoshwa, noqale sekudlule isikhathi ngemuva kokuphela kweGenesis ebikade ikhona. Lo mdlalo ukhuluma ngowesilisa osothandweni kodwa ongakwazi ukuya phambili nempilo yakhe njengoba kukhona izinto ezisambambile, okumele azenze nokwakumele zenziwe abazali bakhe. UVuyo ekhuluma ngale ndawo, uthe umdlalo lona abesilisa abazozibona kuwo njengoba ubheka ubuhle bothando kanjalo nomthwalo oza nalo. "Uzobe ugxile esikweni kakhulu, izinto zamasiko izona ezizobe zihamba phambili kuwona. UZwelakhe kulo mdlalo kuzogqama ukuthi yini adlule kuyo ukuze aqinisekise ukuthi uthando lwakhe nowesifazane azifelayo ngaye aluphazamiseni. Umndeni ufuna okwawo, ufuna enze izinto zamasiko angahlangani nazo, ezenzeka kudala kodwa manje esibhekene naye emehlweni nezimisa impilo yakhe," kusho uVuyo. Uthe yize uZwelakhe engayizwa yonke into atshelwa yona ngoba ekholelwa ukuthi ayibhekene naye kodwa ugcine ehlise umoya akwenze okufuneka kuye ngenxa yokuthi ufuna ukuthatha igxathu elikhulu empilweni yakhe. "Ukwenza kwakhe lokho ngenjongo yokuthi ufuna ukuphila impilo yakhe kula izinto zithanda khona ukushuba njengoba kuvela izinto okungenzeka ziwubumbe umndeni noma ziwubhidlize. Umbuzo ke uthi kumele yini ayeke konke abazali bakhe abamtshela khona okuthinta isiko lakubo, avele aqhubeke nempilo yakhe, athole umuntu amthandayo ashade? Abantu abaningi besilisa bazozibona kulo mdlalo, nesithemba ukuthi kuzoba khona isifundo abanye babone ukuthi yini okumele bayenze ngempilo yabo," kusho yena. Kwabanye abalingisi abazobonakala kulo mdlalo kubalwa uRorisang Mohapi-Grootboom ozobe elingisa indawo kaBahumi, Hlengiwe Lushaba-Madlala (MaMbokazi), Mpho J Molepo, Helen Lebepe, Lindani Nkosi, Nkanyiso Mzimela, Kwanele Mthethwa, Sparky Xulu noPhumzile Mlangeni. UShirley Adonisi ongumqondisi wezinhlelo zakuleli kulesi siteshi, uveze ukuthi bawamukela ngazo zombili lo mdlalo. Uthe uthemba ukuthi ababukeli bazowujabulela njengoba uxube isiko nempilo yaselokishini, waveza ukuthi kuzogqama sengathi bawuqophele elokishini laseMsawawa, eDiepkloof Ext.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMLANDELI weDurban City uNompumelelo Nene nenkakha yebhola yakuleli eyinxusa leBetway Premiership, uLehlohonolo Majoro. Yini ebanga ukuthi inkomishi yeBetway ilandele i-Orlando iPirates emidlalweni yeligi ekubeni kungeyona ompetha? Ngabe kukhona iPremier Soccer League (PSL) efuna ukusitshela khona esingakwazi? Yonke le mibuzo nokubabaza kusabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abalandeli bezibuza khona beziphendula ngembangela yokubonakala kwenkomishi yeligi emidlalweni yePirates kodwa hhayi kweyompetha iMamelodi Sundowns. Iningi likhale ngokuthi laqala ukuyibona emdlalweni wePirates neRichards Bay FC owaphela ngo 2-2 eMhlathuze Sports Complex ngo-Ephreli 10, njengoba iphinde yavela nasemdlalweni wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs ngeSonto eFNB Stadium, eNasrec. Eqinisweni le ndebe yayikhona eChatsworth Stadium ngesikhathi iqembu eliyivikelayo, iSundowns, libhekene neDurban City emdlalweni elawunqoba ngo 1-0 ngo-Ephreli 7. Njengoba le ndebe isithe ukwehluka phezulu uma iqhathaniswa nale eyaqukulwa amaBrazilians ekupheleni kwesizini, kungenzeka ukuthi abaxhasi basebenzise umdlalo omkhulu njengowabakhaya baseSoweto ukuthi baphinde bakhangise ngayo. INDEBE yeBetway Premiership eyaqukulwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2024/25 (kwesokunxele) nendebe yeBetway Premiership ethe ukwehluka ezophakanyiswa yiqembu elizoba ngompetha besizini ka-2025/26 (kwesokudla).

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USASHAQEKILE namanje umndeni wowesilisa waseThokazi, KwaNongoma, okuthiwa ushaywe womunye wesilisa ngequpha, washona, kubangwa eyokukora amagoli amaningi. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeke eMajomela, KwaNongoma, ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uMnuz Phumlani Dlamini (24). Ngokusho kukadadewabo, uNksz Qinisile Dlamini, isigameko senzeke sekuhlakazekwa emva kokuphela komdlalo umufi abeyidlala okuthiwa ibiphakathi kwesikole iMthombowesizwe High kanjalo neNongoma LoveLife Youth Centre. “Kuthiwa uhlaselwe abafana abambalwa okuthiwa wayekade exabane nabo ngempelasonto ende yokuqala kukaMeyi. Kuthiwa iqembu ayepikwe kulo, iMjiva yayikade idlala neqembu lalaba bafana esingalazi igama lalo, yena wase ekora amagoli ayisithupha,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe bezwa kuthiwa abasolwa ababediniwe yilawa amagoli, bazama ukumxakazisa khona lapho kodwa balanyulwa, kwahlukanwa. “Njengoba sebephinda bezomhlasela ngoLwesine. Ngosuku abulawe ngalo kuthiwa waqale washaywa ngoyedwa nenqindi, balanyulwa. Kuthe kusabhekwe lokho, waphinde washaywa owesibili, ngayo inqindi, wavele wawa, wadlikiza, wase ethula,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe umsolwa esebona ukuthi umlimazile umufi, wakhumula ibhande engalweni wamshaya ngalo. “Asazi noma wayesezama ukumvusa noma wayemqedela,” usho kanje. Uthe bayasola ukuthi ibhande elalifakwe umsolwa lalinomuthi onzima, owaholela ekutheni akwazi ukubulala umufi ngenqindi. "Kubuhlungu ngoba umfowethu ubengesiye umuntu wodlame. Ubekhonze ukuzihlekela futhi ezithandela ibhola. Indaba yokuthi aphume ekhaya eyodlala ibhola bese sifikelwa umyalezo wokuthi usebulewe enkundleni yemidlalo, isizwise ubuhlungu obukhulu,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe abakutholile ukuthi kwakudlalelwa isiteki, abangasazi ukuthi esamalini. Uthe umyalezo bawuthola ngomunye ayehambe naye ukuya ebholeni, kwathi uma befika, bathola sekufike namaphoyisa, eseqinisekisile ukuthi useshonile. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga ubezovakashela umndeni kamufi izolo. Esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ukududuza umndeni, abangani nomphakathi waKwaNongoma, uNksz Shinga uzwakalise ukushaqeka nokuphatheka kabi ngesigameko. “Isigameko siyisikhumbuzo esibuhlungu sokuthi kufanele kugqugquzelwe indaba yokuxazulula ukungaboni ngaso linye ngendlela enokuthula ikakhulukazi kubantu abasha abazibandakanya kwezemidlalo,” kusho uNksz Shinga. Uthe ngale kokuyokhalisa umndeni kamufi, bazophinde bawuhlinzeke ngosizo lokwelulekwa ngokomqondo kulandela isigameko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaNongoma abophe owesilisa oneminyaka engu-19 ngecala lokubulala kulandela isigameko sokubulawa kowesilisa. “Ushaywe washona ngoMeyi 7, 2026 KwaMajomela,” kusho uSerg Ngcobo. Uthe umsolwa uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaNongoma ngoMsombuluko.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Thembeka Mpanza, osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre e-UKZN UKUBHEKANA nezinselelo ezihlukene esafika enyuvesi - iningi lazo elalidalwa wukuthi wayesuka endaweni yasemakhaya futhi engakazi okuningi ngenqubo okwenziwa izinto ngayo emanyuvesi - kwamkhuthaza ukucwaninga ngezindlela zokuqeda leyo nkinga. Lwaqala kanjalo uhambo locwaningo lukaNksz Thembeka Mpanza osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre zase-University of KwaZulu-Natal, ngocwaningo lwakhe oluthi Investigation on Black Rural Students Mental Health Wellness. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto ngalokhu, uNksz Mpanza odabuka eNhlungwane, oLundi, uthe yizimo abhekane nazo ngqo ezamphusha ukuthi uma esenza i-Master’s yakhe acwaninge ngalesi simo. “Ngenkathi ngisafika enyuvesi eminyakeni engaphezu kwemihlanu edlule ngaba nenkinga yokungakwazi ukuxhumana kahle nabanye ozakwethu, futhi kwaba nzima nokuqonda into esuke ifundiswa ngaleso sikhathi ngenxa yokuthi ngenkathi ngisafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya, izinto eziningi sasizifundiswa ngesiZulu nje kuphela,” kusho uNksz Mpanza. UNKSZ Thembeka Mpanza, osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre e-UKZN Eqhuba uthe okunye afike wakuqaphela enyuvesi wukuthi izitshudeni ezidabuka emakhaya njengaye neziphuma emindenini eswele beziba nenkinga yokuzizwa zingamukelekile futhi zizibona zisalela emuva kozakwabo ngenxa yokweswela imali nezinsiza zokufunda. “Ngithole ukuthi konke lokho kuhlukumeza kakhulu izitshudeni emqondweni futhi kudale nokuthi ukufunda kwazo kuvame ukungahambi ngendlela efanele kunalezo ezikhulele emadolobheni nasemalokishini ngoba zona zifika sezivele zikwazi okuningi. “Yingakho ocwaningweni lwami ngibheke kakhulu amasu angasiza ukulungisa lesi simo, futhi ngibheka kakhulu ukuthi qhaza lini okudingeka ukuthi libanjwe wubuholi bamanyuvesi ukusiza  izitshudeni ezifana nami ukuze ukufunda kwazo kungabi nzima,” kulanda yena. Uthe isifiso sakhe wukuthi kusetshenziswe izethulo ezifuze ezocwaningo lwakhe ukuzama ukuphucula isimo sokufunda emanyuvesi nasezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ezihlukene okuzosiza ukuthi zonke izitshudeni zizizwe zamukelekile futhi zingacindezelekile.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Sikhulu isikhalo ngokwentuleka kwemisebenzi LISHUNYAYELWA emphakathini ehlukene kuleli kubalwa nakubafundi eyokuqedwa kwemikhakha emidala kwezemfundo nengenasidingo njengoba kufuqwa eyemikhakha emisha, edingwa ngumnotho kanjalo nabaqashi. Leli vangeli lifafazwa wuhlaka iSouth African Qualifications Authority, esemkhankasweni wokuhambela izifundazwe ezehlukene kuleli ihlangana nemiphakathi ehlukene ngale mikhakha. UDkt Makhapha Makhafola isikhulu seSAQA, uthe ngalo mkhankaso bafuna ukuqwashisa abantu ikakhulu intsha ngemikhakha emisha ekhona kuleli. Uthe kuphelile ngezinye zeziqu ebezifundwa kwezinye zezikhungo zemfundo okubalwa namakolishi amakhono ama-Technical Vacational Education and Training (TVET). "Sihambela izifundazwe ezehlukene lapho esingagcini nje ngokukhuluma ngemikhakha edingwa abaqashi kanjalo nomnotho, kodwa sixwayisa nangezinye izinto okubalwa iziqu zomgunyathi nomthelela wazo. Sifuna abaqeda ukufunda bangabhuquzi emakhaya bagcine bengazi ukuthi bazokwenzani kodwa benze izinto ezidingekayo kuleli," usho kanje ekhuluma neNewzroom Afrika. Usho lokhu nje amaTVET aqede eminye yemikhakha eyayenziwa njengoba esenzisa emisha. Phakathi kwemikhakha emisha kubalwa eyokucwala izinwele, eyokudayisa, ethinta ugesi nokukhanda izimoto, eyokwakha, eyobuchwepheshe bamakhompyutha. Ezikoleni kuqaliwe kufundwa izifundo ezintsha okubalwa neCoding and Robotics ukuze abafundi babe nolwazi zisuka amadaka ngalezi zifundo. UMakhafola uthe basebenzisana nomnyango weMfundo ePhakeme okuyiwo osebenzisana nezikhungo ekufundiseni le mikhakha. "Odabeni oluthinta iziqu ezingumgunyathi, sixwayisa abanazo nabacabanga ukwenza lo mkhonyovu ukuthi bagawule babheke. Asisineki uma ubanjwa neziqu zomgunyathi." Uthe labo abaneziqu ezindala abangatatazeli ngoba akusho ukuthi azisenasisindo. "Siwuhlaka olugcina ulwazi lwawo wonke umuntu oneziqu kuleli. Uma uneziqu ezindala akusho ukuthi azisenasidingo. Kunabasano-matric omdala, okungasho ukuthi abakwazi ukuqhuba izifundo zabo noma bathole umsebenzi ngoba sekukhona u-matric omusha manje. Ngalokhu sithi phansi amaphaphu kulabo abaneziqu ezindala ngoba akusho ukuthi kuphelile ngabo," usho kanje.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSanele Barns, obuyela kwiRichards Bay FC emuva kwesizini nesigamu egijima kwiStellenbosch FC Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX USIHLALO weRichards Bay, uSifiso "Jomo" Biyela, uveze ukuthi uSanele Barns ubevele efuna ukubuyela kuleli qembu elamdayisela iStellenbosch FC  ngo-2024. Lo mdlali oyibamba ezinhlangothini, wadayiswa yiBay ngo-R5 million maphakathi nesizini ka-2023/2025 kodwa waze wayifulathela emuva kokuyivikisa izembe ngokunqoba imidlalo yokuhlunga eyayidlala namaqembu eMotsepe Foundation Championship kulandela ukuqeda endaweni ka-15 kwi-log yeBetway Premiership. Emuva komdlalo wokugcina eyawudlala neBaroka eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza, uBarns wenganywa wusizi evalelisa kubalandeli beBay. UBiyela uveze ukuthi bebefuna ukumboleka uBarns kwiStellies kodwa leli qembu lafuna ukubadayisela okuyinto abayivumile. "Sesibheke ekutheni simthenge ngoba le nto yokuboleka abadlali iyahlupha. Sifuna umdlali azazi ukuthi ukuphi, abe ngowethu ukuze sibashaye ngaye uma befika lapha," kusho uBiyela. KwiStellies, uBarns udlale imidlalo engu-68, washaya amagoli ayisikhombisa, wakha ayisithupha emiqhudelwaneni ehlukene. Ekuqaleni kwesizini iBay isayinise inqwaba yabadlali abasebancane, yanyusa nabebedlala kwiDStv Diski Challenge abangenaso isipiliyoni sokudlala kwiPremiership. UBiyela uthe kuzobasiza ukubuya kukaBarns. "Ubelokhu esho ukuthi ufuna ukubuyela eqenjini. Nathi sikuvumile lokho ngoba vele akahambanga ngoba engumdlali obhedayo kodwa sasinezinkinga zemali ngaleso sikhathi. Ngaphandle kokuthi ungumdlali osezingeni eliphezulu, ungumuntu okukuhle ukuba naye eqenjini. Uzosisiza kakhulu ngesipiliyoni sakhe ngoba sinabadlali abasebancane eqenjini," kusho uBiyela. IBay isendaweni yesishiyagalolunye kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni engu-15. Izobhekana neLamontville Golden Arrows emdlalweni wePremiership wabakhaya baKwaZulu-Natal eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngo-7.30 ebusuku.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI waMaZulu FC, uThapelo Matlhoko, ongangabazi ukuthi basenethuba lokuqeda isizini besendaweni yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership bazibekisele indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup UMGADLI waMaZulu FC, uThapelo Matlhoko, akangabazi ukuthi basenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership ngokuphela kwale sizini ka-2025/26 esisongwa. AmaZulu, asendaweni yesine kwi-log yePremiership, abalwa namaqembu asalwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu okuyindawo eyisango lokuyodlala kwiCaf Confed. Iqembu elizoqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log kule sizini lizojoyina iDurban City kwiCaf Confed esivele izibekisele indawo kulo mqhudelwano wasezwenikazi lase-Afrika ngokunqoba isicoco seNedbank Cup ngempelasonto. IKaizer Chiefs isahlezi endaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-47, ilandelwa aMaZulu ngawu-42, kube yiSekhukhune United kweyesihlanu ngawu-39. AmaZulu azodlala neLamontville Golden Arrows kowePremiership wabakhaya baseThekwini kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Lo mdlalo ufana nowamagqubu kwazise emidlalweni emithathu AmaZulu yiwona anqobile ngesikhathi la maqembu etholene phezulu kowabakhaya. Kule midlalo kubalwa nowomzuliswano wokuqala wesizini AmaZulu aguqisa kuwo i-Arrows ngo 1-0 ngoDisemba 2 eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. “Ngumdlalo omkhulu wabakhaya, esizimisele ngokuwunqoba noma sazi ukuthi akuzukuba lula ukubhekana ne-Arrows,” kusho uMatlhoko. Usuthu luza kulo mdlalo luthelwe ngezibonkolo njengoba emdlalweni eligcine ukuwudlala wePremiership luvulele isibhaxu sika 5-1 kwiChippa United. “Ngikholwa wukuthi sisengakwazi ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu. Sidlala kahle futhi sizimisele. Ngisho nayo iKaizer Chiefs izoshaqeka ngoba izosithola simi ngomumo siyilindile,” kusho uMatlhoko ngokuzethemba. UMatlhoko (23) odabuka eMunsieville, eKrugersdorp, ujoyine Usuthu ngaphambi kokuqala kwale sizini esuka kwiKruger United edlala kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship, lapho abenza khona ezibukwayo waphenduka inyama emaqenjini ehlukene ePremiership. Nakuba efike wabhekana nobunzima ekutholeni ijezi ngaphansi komqeqeshi u-Arthur Zwane, kodwa usalibambe ngazo zombili ithuba asalinikiwe. Emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili asayidlalile useshaye amagoli amathathu, waba nesandla kwelilodwa. “Zonke izinto zenzeka ngesizathu. Yebo bekungelula ukuhlala ngingadlali kodwa bengazi ukuthi ithuba lami liyeza. Okwenzeka kimi kule sizini ngikuthatha njengesifundo, ikakhulukazi njengoba kuyisizini yami yokuqala ngidlala kwiPremiership.
