Ngikholwa wukuthi ngesizini ezayo ngizokwenza okungcono kakhulu ukusiza iqembu lami," usho kanje uMatlhoko. Ngemuva kowe-Arrows, Usuthu luzokwamukela iChiefs eMoses Mabhida Stadium ngoMeyi 16 .

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: INTANDOKAZI yomlingisi uSindi Dlathu ingomunye wabalingisi ababuyayo kulo mkhakha njengoba izoba ngomunye wabalingisi abaphambili emdlalweni iThe For of Us nozakwabo uRami Chuene USINDI Dlathu noRami Chuene abake babonakala emidlalweni emikhulu kuleli bakhuza ibuya kulo mkhakha ngemuva kweminyaka bengabonakali. Laba bethulwe njengabanye babalingisi abasha abazobonakala emdlalweni iThe Four of Us, ozoqala ngenyanga ezayo kwi-e.tv. Lo mdlalo uzokhonjiswa phakathi nezinsuku uzovala isikhala somdlalo iScandal! efinyelela emaphethelweni ngemuva kokukhombiswa iminyaka engaphezu kwengu-10 kulesi siteshi. Ngempelasonto i-e.tv imemezele ingxenye yabalingisi bokuqala lezi zintandokazi zabalingisi eziyingxenye yabo. Abanye abamenyezelwe kubalwa uThembinkosi Mthembu, Kelebogile Masango, Sdumo Mtshali, Dumisani Dlamini noMagic Hlatshwayo osanda kuhlonishwa ngendondo yeLifetime Achievement emcimbini amaSafta. Abakwa-e.tv baveze ukuthi ukuhamba kwesikhathi bazoqhubeka bamemezele abanye abalingisi okuhlanganisa nabomdlalo oqoshwa eThekwini othi eGagasini. UHelga Palmer, obhekelele ukuthuthukisa izinhlelo zakuleli kwa-eMedia, ugcizelele ukuthi izinguquko abazenzayo manje zingumbono abanawo walesi siteshi ukusithatha ezingeni elikuso manje basibeke kwelinye. "Ukwethula izinhlelo ezimbili kusho ukukhula kakhulu kwemidlalo esiba nayo ngezikhathi esizithatha njengokuthi zibalulekile ebusuku la iningi labantu lisuke selizibukela amathelevishini. Okusijabulisa kakhulu ukuthi sisebenze nezinkampani ezimbili ezinkulu esezenze imidlalo ehlonishwe ngezindondo kuleli nakwamanye amazwe, bathembise ukusiziza nathi siqhubeke nokuvula amathuba omsebenzi entsheni yakithi futhi kuphinde kugqame nezinto ezihlukene ezenzeka emiphakathini yakithi,” kusho uHelga. Uthe njengesiteshi bazinike ekutheni balethe imidlalo nezinhlelo ezizodala ukuthi abantu baxoxe emphakathini futhi zigcine abalandeli abaningi. Umdlalo othi eGagasini wona ukhiqizwa inkampani iStained Glass TV omunye wabaphathi bayo okunguPepsi Pokane. UPokane uveze ukuthi lo mdlalo wona ugxile entsheni efuna ukwakha igama ayo endimeni yomculo nokuyinto engezi kalula njengoba kukhona izingqinamba ehlangana nazo endleleni nokuyinto ezobonakala kulo mdlalo. Abalingisi balo mdlalo bona kulindeleke ukuthi bethulwe kuleli sonto.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INHLOKO yoPhiko lwezaBathengi nokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi eStandard Bank, uNkk Naledzani Mosomane OSOMABHIZINISI abasafufusa nabafisa ukuchuma kwezamabhizinisi banengqayizivele yethuba lokufeza lokho ngohlelo lwe-Standard Bank lokufukula osomabhizinisi abangakachumi lwaminyaka yonke i-Standard Bank Kasi SME Pitch Challenge. I-Standard Bank iqinisekise ukuthi nakulo nyaka luyabuya lolu hlelo olukhuza ibuya ihlandla lesine, luhambisana nesamba somklomelo ka-R1 million - osekuvele kuvuliwe ukungenela kulona okuzoze kuvalwe ngoMeyi 22. Kanjengaminyaka yonke, nakulo nyaka kuzoqokwa osomabhizinisi abawu-10 isifundazwe ngasinye, abazonikwa ithuba lokukhuluma nokudayisa amabhizinisi abo emajajini azobe ehlunga, bese kuqokwa abathathu kubona isifundazwe ngasinye - bese abanqobayo kubona bakhale bemuke no-R50 000, bese abaphume isibili nesithathu baduduzwe ngo-R10 000. Akupheleli lapho, njengoba kuzothi labo somabhizinisi abayisishiyagalolunye abazobe benqobe ezifundazweni, bazobe sebeqhubekela kwi-Standard Bank Kasi SME Natonal Pitch Challenge, lapho bezobe sebebanga khona isamba somklomelo ka-R1 million wozonqoba. INhloko yoPhiko lwezaBathengi nokuThuthukisa amaBhizinisi eStandard Bank, uNkk Naledzani Mosomane, ithe okunye okuhle ngalokho wukuthi osomabhizinisi abangu-10 abahambe phambilini bazothola nethuba lokufakwa ohlelweni lokubacebisa nokubachushisa ngamasu nezindlela zokubasiza ukuthuthukisa amabhizinisi abo kubhekwe phambili. “Lokhu kuyingxenye yezindlela esizibophezela ngazo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi osomabhizinisi abehlukene bayathuthuka ezweni lethu nokuphendla indlela yamathuba okufukula umnotho, ngoba siqonda ukuthi osomabhizinisi abasafufusa baneqhaza elimqoka abalibambayo emphakathini ngakho akumele ukuthi sibayekelele bezabalaze ngabodwana,” usho kanje. Imigomo ezolandelwa kwabazongenela kulo nyaka imi kanjena: Osomabhizinisi abafisa ukungenela bengangena kwi-website yaseStandard Bank ukuthola imininingwane efanele yokumele bakwenze ukuze bangenele.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Omoda C4 ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED ngaphambili nangemuva Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu KUNGEKUDALA umndeni wakwa-Omoda eNingizimu Afrika uzokwandiswa nge-C4 evezwe okokuqala embukisweni iBeijing Auto Show, eChina, ngesonto eledlule. I-C4 izongena ngaphansi kwe-C4 esiphenduke intandokazi, hhayi kuphela kuleli, kodwa nakwamanye amazwe njengoba kuyiyona moto i-Omoda eyazethula ngayo emphakathini. Kulindeleke ukuthi incintisane namanye ama-SUV angangayo okubalwa i-VW T-Cross, Chery Tiggo 4 Pro neKia Sonet. Ibukeka izoheha abaningi ngendlela ekhanga ngayo ngaphandle njengoba inama-criss amahle emzimbeni. Ngaphandle ungalindela amalambu angama-LED ngaphambili nangemuva kanjalo namarimu angu-18 inch. Ngimangazwe yisikhala ngaphakathi kwayo ngoba ngaphandle ibukeka iqoqekile. Ivulekile bo! Ngaphakathi i-Omoda C4 ayinalo uxhaxha lwamabhathini njengoba okuningi ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system engu-13.2-inch Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ilayisha abagibeli abayisihlanu futhi okumnandi ngemuva phakathi nendawo ezinyaweni wukuthi akukho gquma elikhona nokwenza kuhlaleke kahle. Khona ngemuva abagibeli banezimbobo zokukhipha umoya we-aircon kanjalo nezindawo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB. Ibhuthi ilingana nayo kodwa ngithe ngiphenya ngangalibona isondo eliyisipele. Nokho kusengenzeka ukuthi elethwa kuleli ifike nalo. Ngaphambili amehlo ami athathwe yibhathini lokuyidumisa elizishaya sengathi ele-Lamborghini. Kwesinye kunezinto ezincane njengamabhathini ezikwenza uzibone usezingeni elingaphezu kwemoto okuyo. Kugqama ne-touschreen infotainment system enkulu lapho wenza khona cishe konke. Ukwazi nokudlala i-game kuso. Nangemuva ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED i-Omoda C4 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Okhakhayini ubona isibhakabhaka kodwa aluvuleki. Kwa-Omoda & Jaecoo eNingizimu Afrika bathembise ukuyiletha ungakapheli lo nyaka. Yilapho futhi kuzoqinisekiswa khona nezinhlobo zezinjini ezizayo kodwa bakuvezile ukuthi bazoletha ekaphethroli nengunhliziyombili, i-hybrid. Izobe inezinsiza zomshayeli ezengeza ezokuphepha ezingu-16, amakhamera aveza umzimba wonke nokunye. Uma izobiza intengo encane ibukeka izothatha abaningi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Urenda Mhlongo nendodakazi yakhe uSni Mhlongo AMA-VIDEO nezithombe zabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana bekhombisa ukuba ngabangani sekwenze ukuthi uBrenda Mhlongo nendodakazi yakhe uSnikiwe "Sni" Mhlongo bathandwe abaningi. Ukuthandwa kwabo kwenza nezinkampani zibanake njengoba beke babonakale bekhangisa ngemikhiqizo ethile. Njengoba ngeSonto kugujwa uSuku loMama uBrenda, ongumlingisi oqale wazungeza amazwe omhlaba nomdlalo iThe Lion King, noSni, oyi-influencer, bakhulume ngobudlelwano babo nokuthi bazolugubha kanjani lolu suku. UBrenda uluchaze ngokuthi wusuku lokuhlonipha omama. Uthe ngaphezu kokuba wumama kuSni uphinde abe ngumngani wakhe omkhulu. “Angikhuliswanga umama,” kusho lo mlingisi odabuka KwaMashu. “Ngakhuliswa ugogo nokuyikhona okwenza ngenza isiqiniseko sokuthi ngiba nobudlelwano obuhle nendodakazi yami. Ngangihlezi ngilangazelele ukuba nabo nomama. Yingakho namanje singabangani noSnikiwe.” Yize engandanga kakhulu ngonina kodwa uthe yena wenza isiqiniseko sokuthi uba khona ngaso sonke isikhathi empilweni yezingane zakhe zontathu. “Singabangani abakhulu. Sinobudlelwano engangifuna ukuba nabo nomama wami. Sikhuluma ngayo yonke into. Akekho ongangena phakathi kwethu.” USni uchaze unina njengomuntu ongawubambi umshini yize bengabangani. “Uyawuqinisa umthetho! Singabangani impela kodwa akadlaleli ngasekuthambiseni isandla uma efuna kwenziwe izinto ngendlela efanele,” kusho uSni olandelwa yizinkulungwane ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngenxa yokuthanda ingqephu nokunye. USni uthe kuningi akufunda kunina okuyohlala naye ingunaphakade. “Ungifundise ukuba wumuntu nokubazi abantu,” kusho uSni. Uthe njengoba behlala emadolobheni ahlukene, ngeke bakwazi ukulugubha ndawonye uSuku loMama. “Noma kunjalo kodwa ngizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi uyazibungaza egameni lami!” UBrenda uphethe ngokululeka omama bamanje ukuthi banganqeni ukukhuluma nganoma yini nezingane zabo. “Ikakhulukazi amantombazane. Asenze bangasisabi abantwana bethu kodwa basihloniphe bakwazi ukukhuluma nathi nganoma yini,” kusho uBrenda.
